Empower V4: rework_rate.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Persist\\u00eancia contextual\\\", \\\"Reutiliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o de prompts/workflows\\\", \\\"Frequ\\u00eancia de skill ativada / n_prompts.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Estrutura\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\\", \\\"Skills, conectores e frameworks ativos\\\", \\\"Contagem direta por conta.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Complexidade\\\", \\\"Score de dificuldade da tarefa\\\", \\\"Rubrica 1-5 (simples a alta complexidade) aplicada antes da execu\\u00e7\\u00e3o.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Qualidade\\\", \\\"Rubrica de ader\\u00eancia/completude\\\", \\\"Score 0-5 por: ader\\u00eancia ao pedido, completude, clareza, profundidade.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"ROI operacional\\\", \\\"Valor \\u00fatil / tempo\\\", \\\"Entreg\\u00e1veis \\u00fateis (peso por complexidade) / tempo investido.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Modularidade\\\", \\\"Taxa de reaproveitamento\\\", \\\"Artefatos reaproveitados em outro contexto / total criado.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Escalabilidade\\\", \\\"Plataformas reaproveitadas\\\", \\\"n_canais distintos onde o mesmo artefato foi publicado.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Maturidade Empower V4\\\", \\\"Score 1-5 (L1 Ad-hoc a L5 Systematic)\\\", \\\"1 + 4*(0.30*prompt_structure + 0.25*context_richness + 0.20*output_control + 0.10*task_diversity + 0.10*high_value_task_share + 0.05*evidence_attachment)\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Lift Empower V4\\\", \\\"Lift = improved_rate / baseline_rate\\\", \\\"Baseline = short_direct + low_context. Aplicar a success_1st_turn, usefulness_score, rework_rate, hallucination_rate.\\\"),\\n]\\nr = 4\\nfor m in metrics:\\n    for i, v in enumerate(m, 1):\\n        body_cell(ws, r, i, v, bold=(i == 2))\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 38\\n    r += 1\\n\\n# =====================================================================\\n# SHEET 11 \\u2014 CLASSIFICA\\u00c7\\u00c3O DE EVID\\u00caNCIA\\n# =====================================================================\\nws = wb.create_sheet(\\\"11_CLASSIF_EVIDENCIA\\\")\\nsetcols(ws, [22, 60])\\ntitle_row(ws, 1, \\\"CLASSIFICA\\u00c7\\u00c3O DE EVID\\u00caNCIA \\u2014 DEFINI\\u00c7\\u00d5ES E USO\\\", span=2)\\n\\nclasses = [\\n    (\\\"Direct evidence\\\", \\\"Estudo peer-reviewed ou documenta\\u00e7\\u00e3o oficial que mede DIRETAMENTE a rela\\u00e7\\u00e3o entre uma das vari\\u00e1veis (L/P/S/FD/C) e o outcome (produtividade ou retrabalho), em contexto compar\\u00e1vel.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Inferred evidence\\\", \\\"Estudo que mede um proxy pr\\u00f3ximo ou um efeito relacionado, do qual se infere apoio \\u00e0 tese \\u2014 exige racioc\\u00ednio expl\\u00edcito de ponte.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Hypothesis\\\", \\\"Afirma\\u00e7\\u00e3o n\\u00e3o testada empiricamente. Posicionamento te\\u00f3rico, opini\\u00e3o informada ou claim operacional sem dado de apoio.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Opinion\\\", \\\"Posicionamento sem rigor metodol\\u00f3gico. Blog post, thread, coment\\u00e1rio de especialista sem base emp\\u00edrica declarada.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Contextual material\\\", \\\"Informa\\u00e7\\u00e3o que ajuda a entender o cen\\u00e1rio (cronograma do AI Act, estat\\u00edsticas demogr\\u00e1ficas) mas n\\u00e3o testa a tese.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Discarded material\\\", \\\"Conte\\u00fado encontrado mas com score <40% ou fonte n\\u00e3o verific\\u00e1vel. Registrar para transpar\\u00eancia.\\\"),\\n]\\nr = 3\\nfor k, v in classes:\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 1, k, fill=SECTION_FILL, bold=True)\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 2, v)\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 50\\n    r += 1\\n\\n# Pr\\u00e9-findings do scan interno\\nsection_row(ws, r + 1, \\\"PR\\u00c9-FINDINGS DO SCAN INTERNO (TURNO ANTERIOR)\\\", span=2)\\nr += 2\\nprefindings = [\\n    (\\\"Pr\\u00e9-finding 1\\\", \\\"O notes file j\\u00e1 \\u00e9 um documento auditorial parcial. A auditoria deve submeter o notes file ao mesmo rigor que aplica a fontes externas.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Pr\\u00e9-finding 2\\\", \\\"Toda claim de produtividade no .numbers e no aigovbrasil_v3_exec \\u00e9 self-reported, n=1, sem controle. Classificar como 'self-reported operational claims', n\\u00e3o como 'evidence of productivity gain'.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Pr\\u00e9-finding 3\\\", \\\"Empower V4 \\u00e9 o \\u00fanico instrumento mensur\\u00e1vel falsific\\u00e1vel no corpus. Candidato natural para valida\\u00e7\\u00e3o emp\\u00edrica do estudo.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Pr\\u00e9-finding 4\\\", \\\"O lado outcome da f\\u00f3rmula tem a evid\\u00eancia mais fraca. As estat\\u00edsticas Workday/KPMG descrevem o PROBLEMA (uso desestruturado), n\\u00e3o o EFEITO da interven\\u00e7\\u00e3o (uso estruturado). C6 deve verificar isso na fonte prim\\u00e1ria.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Pr\\u00e9-finding 5\\\", \\\"O corpus operacional (24 skills, m\\u00e9todo 9-fases, suite multi-camada) \\u00e9 genuinamente incomum. Poss\\u00edvel claim de novidade \\u2014 mas separado da claim de produtividade.\\\"),\\n]\\nfor k, v in prefindings:\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 1, k, fill=WARNING_FILL, bold=True)\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 2, v)\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 55\\n    r += 1\\n\\n# =====================================================================\\n# SHEET 12 \\u2014 REPURPOSE PIPELINE\\n# =====================================================================\\nws = wb.create_sheet(\\\"12_REPURPOSE_PIPELINE\\\")\\nsetcols(ws, [18, 22, 38, 30, 14, 18])\\ntitle_row(ws, 1, \\\"PIPELINE DE PUBLICA\\u00c7\\u00c3O MULTI-CANAL\\\")\\nheader_row(ws, 3, [\\\"Canal\\\", \\\"Formato\\\", \\\"\\u00c2ngulo / Mensagem central\\\", \\\"CTA\\\", \\\"Prioridade\\\", \\\"Skill envolvida\\\"])\\n\\nrepurpose = [\\n    (\\\"GitHub\\\", \\\"Reposit\\u00f3rio + README + dataset + XLS\\\",\\n     \\\"Replication kit: tese + framework + planilha + CMD + scripts. Source of truth t\\u00e9cnica.\\\",\\n     \\\"Star / fork / replicar\\\", \\\"1 \\u2014 Backbone\\\", \\\"cmd-01-pps + project-packager\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Medium\\\", \\\"Long-form article\\\",\\n     \\\"Tese + contexto + m\\u00e9todo + evid\\u00eancias + limita\\u00e7\\u00f5es + framework aberto. Estilo Review Journal (BBC+HBR+AP).\\\",\\n     \\\"Read full study\\\", \\\"1 \\u2014 Prim\\u00e1rio\\\", \\\"frankwatching-editor + scripity\\\"),\\n    (\\\"LinkedIn\\\", \\\"Post de impacto + carrossel + post anal\\u00edtico\\\",\\n     \\\"Lead: ROI operacional, onboarding, evid\\u00eancias. Estilo aigovbrasil \\u2014 operacional, s\\u00f3brio, evid\\u00eancia-led.\\\",\\n     \\\"Comment / connect\\\", \\\"2 \\u2014 Distribui\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\\", \\\"FORGE (carrossel) + frankwatching-editor\\\"),\\n    (\\\"X (Twitter)\\\", \\\"Thread (uma claim por post)\\\",\\n     \\\"Quebra do artigo em 8-12 posts. Cada um carrega uma evid\\u00eancia ou framework.\\\",\\n     \\\"Bookmark / follow\\\", \\\"3 \\u2014 Discovery\\\", \\\"live-prompt-pro-converter\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Newsletter\\\", \\\"Email digest com link para Medium e GitHub\\\",\\n     \\\"Resumo executivo + 1 insight central + link para o estudo completo. Reuso direto do abstract.\\\",\\n     \\\"Read full study\\\", \\\"2 \\u2014 Funil pr\\u00f3prio\\\", \\\"frankwatching-editor\\\"),\\n    (\\\"YouTube\\\", \\\"Walkthrough do framework (15-20 min)\\\",\\n     \\\"Demo pr\\u00e1tica da planilha + CMD + s\\u00edntese. Visual.\\\",\\n     \\\"Subscribe\\\", \\\"4 \\u2014 Fase 2\\\", \\\"FORGE (assets visuais)\\\"),\\n]\\nr = 4\\nfor rp in repurpose:\\n    for i, v in enumerate(rp, 1):\\n        body_cell(ws, r, i, v, bold=(i == 1))\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 65\\n    r += 1\\n\\n# Depend\\u00eancias\\nsection_row(ws, r + 1, \\\"ORDEM DE PUBLICA\\u00c7\\u00c3O RECOMENDADA\\\", span=6)\\nr += 2\\norder_items = [\\n    (\\\"Passo 1\\\", \\\"GitHub: publicar o reposit\\u00f3rio com XLS + CMD + scripts + draft do artigo em README. Marca a data.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Passo 2\\\", \\\"Medium: publicar long-form com link para o GitHub. Linka como 'replication kit'.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Passo 3\\\", \\\"LinkedIn: post anal\\u00edtico com link para Medium + carrossel resumindo achados.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Passo 4\\\", \\\"X thread: 8-12 tweets quebrando o estudo, com link no \\u00faltimo para Medium.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Passo 5\\\", \\\"Newsletter: digest da semana, primeira posi\\u00e7\\u00e3o.\\\"),\\n    (\\\"Passo 6 (opcional)\\\", \\\"YouTube: walkthrough ap\\u00f3s pelo menos 1 ciclo de feedback p\\u00fablico.\\\"),\\n]\\nfor k, v in order_items:\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 1, k, fill=DECISION_FILL, bold=True)\\n    ws.merge_cells(start_row=r, start_column=2, end_row=r, end_column=6)\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 2, v)\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 28\\n    r += 1\\n\\n# =====================================================================\\n# SHEET 13 \\u2014 CMD PRONTO\\n# =====================================================================\\nws = wb.create_sheet(\\\"13_CMD_PRONTO\\\")\\nsetcols(ws, [120])\\ntitle_row(ws, 1, \\\"CMD PRONTO \\u2014 COLE NO WIDE RESEARCH\\\", span=1)\\n\\ncmd_text = \\\"\\\"\\\"=========================================================\\nCMD PARA WIDE RESEARCH MODE \\u2014 TESE ESTRUTURA DE CONTA IA\\nVers\\u00e3o 1.0 \\u00b7 Maio 2026 \\u00b7 Para: claude.ai \\u2192 modo Wide Research\\n=========================================================\\n\\n[PAPEL]\\nVoc\\u00ea \\u00e9 um analista de pesquisa s\\u00eanior, auditor metodol\\u00f3gico e agente de\\ns\\u00edntese de evid\\u00eancias. Sua miss\\u00e3o N\\u00c3O \\u00e9 validar a tese do autor \\u2014 \\u00e9\\ninvestigar, pressionar, testar, refinar e desafiar com rigor metodol\\u00f3gico,\\nracioc\\u00ednio causal e separa\\u00e7\\u00e3o rigorosa entre evid\\u00eancia, infer\\u00eancia, hip\\u00f3tese\\ne opini\\u00e3o. Trate fontes confirmat\\u00f3rias com escrut\\u00ednio NORMAL e fontes\\ncontr\\u00e1rias com escrut\\u00ednio mais LENIENTE (assimetria intencional para\\ncombater vi\\u00e9s de confirma\\u00e7\\u00e3o).\\n\\n[TESE A INVESTIGAR]\\n\\\"Contas de IA profissionalmente estruturadas \\u2014 combinando letramento em IA,\\npersonaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o persistente, skills reutiliz\\u00e1veis (SKILL.md), frameworks\\ndetermin\\u00edsticos e conectores (MCP) \\u2014 produzem maior efici\\u00eancia operacional\\ne menor retrabalho do que contas n\\u00e3o estruturadas.\\\"\\n\\nF\\u00f3rmula: L + P + S + FD + C  \\u2192  \\u2191 produtividade,  \\u2193 retrabalho\\nOnde:\\n- L = letramento em IA\\n- P = personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o da conta\\n- S = Skills / SKILL.md\\n- FD = frameworks determin\\u00edsticos\\n- C = conectores (MCP)\\n\\n[MISS\\u00c3O]\\nInvestigar 9 clusters de pesquisa, retornando entre 5 e 10 fontes por cluster\\n(meta total: 50-80 fontes). Para cada fonte, preencher TODOS os campos do\\nschema abaixo. N\\u00e3o inventar. N\\u00e3o preencher campos sem evid\\u00eancia verific\\u00e1vel.\\n\\n[OUTPUT SCHEMA \\u2014 UM OBJETO JSON POR FONTE]\\n{\\n  \\\"cluster_id\\\": \\\"C1\\\",                     // C1..C9\\n  \\\"source_id\\\": \\\"S005\\\",                    // sequencial a partir de S005\\n  \\\"title\\\": \\\"...\\\",\\n  \\\"authors_or_org\\\": \\\"...\\\",\\n  \\\"year\\\": 2025,\\n  \\\"region\\\": \\\"US|Global|EU|Brasil|Outro\\\",\\n  \\\"source_type\\\": \\\"peer-reviewed paper | preprint | official docs | repo | industry report | book | thesis\\\",\\n  \\\"url\\\": \\\"https://...\\\",                   // verific\\u00e1vel\\n  \\\"methodology\\\": \\\"1-2 frases descrevendo design do estudo\\\",\\n  \\\"sample_or_dataset\\\": \\\"n=... ou descri\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\\",\\n  \\\"main_claim\\\": \\\"1-2 frases\\\",\\n  \\\"relevance_to_thesis\\\": \\\"1-2 frases ligando \\u00e0 f\\u00f3rmula L+P+S+FD+C\\\",\\n  \\\"similarity_topic_0_5\\\": 4,              // overlap conceitual\\n  \\\"similarity_method_0_5\\\": 3,             // overlap metodol\\u00f3gico\\n  \\\"similarity_tooling_0_5\\\": 4,            // overlap de ferramentas\\n  \\\"similarity_outcome_0_5\\\": 3,            // overlap de outcome\\n  \\\"similarity_context_0_5\\\": 2,            // overlap de contexto (individual/equipe, BR/US)\\n  \\\"evidence_type\\\": \\\"direct | inferred | hypothesis | opinion | contextual\\\",\\n  \\\"contradicts_thesis\\\": false,            // true se a fonte enfraquece ou contradiz\\n  \\\"limitations\\\": \\\"1-2 frases sobre limita\\u00e7\\u00f5es da fonte\\\",\\n  \\\"confidence_0_5\\\": 4,\\n  \\\"notes\\\": \\\"opcional, contexto adicional\\\"\\n}\\n\\n[REGRAS]\\n1. N\\u00c3O INVENTAR. Se n\\u00e3o houver fonte confirm\\u00e1vel com URL, n\\u00e3o retornar.\\n2. CADA CLUSTER exige pelo menos 1 fonte com contradicts_thesis=true OU\\n   evid\\u00eancia emp\\u00edrica enfraquecendo a tese.\\n3. PRIORIDADE de fontes: peer-reviewed > documenta\\u00e7\\u00e3o oficial >\\n   reposit\\u00f3rio > relat\\u00f3rio industrial > artigo de blog t\\u00e9cnico cred\\u00edvel.\\n4. SCORE ponderado de similaridade = topic*0.30 + method*0.20 + tooling*0.20\\n   + outcome*0.15 + context*0.15 (calculado pelo autor depois \\u2014 voc\\u00ea s\\u00f3\\n   preenche os 5 sub-scores).\\n5. CRIT\\u00c9RIO M\\u00cdNIMO de inclus\\u00e3o: score ponderado \\u2265 40%. Se voc\\u00ea estimar que\\n   ficaria abaixo disso, ainda inclua mas marque evidence_type=\\\"contextual\\\".\\n6. PARA C9 (Brasil), priorizar: SBC (Sociedade Brasileira de Computa\\u00e7\\u00e3o),\\n   SciELO, reposit\\u00f3rios universit\\u00e1rios brasileiros (USP, UFRJ, UFMG, FGV,\\n   Insper, Unicamp), portal da CAPES.\\n7. SE DUAS FONTES dizem a mesma coisa, manter apenas a prim\\u00e1ria.\\n8. CITA\\u00c7\\u00d5ES diretas s\\u00f3 se forem essenciais \\u2014 preferir par\\u00e1frase.\\n\\n[OS 9 CLUSTERS]\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C1 \\u2014 Letramento em IA + Prompt Engineering (n\\u00facleo) \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7 fontes. Inclui Knoth et al. 2024 (j\\u00e1 validado) como ponto de partida.\\nQueries em ingl\\u00eas:\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI literacy prompt engineering\\\" review 2024 2025\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI fluency\\\" framework empirical study Anthropic\\n  \\u2022 prompt structure productivity LLM peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 prompt quality user expertise correlation\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando que prompting estruturado N\\u00c3O melhora\\noutput ou tem efeito nulo / inconsistente.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C2 \\u2014 Personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o e contexto persistente \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 6 fontes.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 LLM personalization system prompts performance\\n  \\u2022 custom instructions ChatGPT Claude benchmark\\n  \\u2022 persistent context user productivity LLM\\n  \\u2022 memory augmented LLM task completion study\\nFalseamento alvo: regress\\u00e3o de personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o em tarefas fora da distribui\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\nou degrada\\u00e7\\u00e3o por overfitting de contexto.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C3 \\u2014 Skills reutiliz\\u00e1veis / SKILL.md / agentes modulares \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7 fontes. Inclui Anthropic docs (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic Claude Skills SKILL.md documentation\\n  \\u2022 reusable prompt templates modular LLM workflow\\n  \\u2022 LangGraph AutoGen CrewAI productivity comparison\\n  \\u2022 function calling tool use reusable patterns enterprise\\nFalseamento alvo: reprodutibilidade fraca ou inconsist\\u00eancia entre execu\\u00e7\\u00f5es\\nde workflows baseados em skills.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C4 \\u2014 Frameworks determin\\u00edsticos / workflows com gates \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5 fontes.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 deterministic LLM workflow DSPy LangChain benchmark\\n  \\u2022 constrained decoding output quality study\\n  \\u2022 gate-based pipeline LLM consistency\\n  \\u2022 structured workflow vs free-form prompting outcome\\nFalseamento alvo: workflows determin\\u00edsticos perdem performance em tarefas\\nabertas, criativas ou explorat\\u00f3rias.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C5 \\u2014 Conectores / MCP / tool use \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5 fontes. Inclui MCP docs (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Model Context Protocol MCP adoption study\\n  \\u2022 tool use LLM error rate latency benchmark\\n  \\u2022 function calling productivity benchmark enterprise\\n  \\u2022 external tool integration LLM workflow efficiency\\nFalseamento alvo: custo de fric\\u00e7\\u00e3o, lat\\u00eancia ou erro de MCP supera o ganho\\nde produtividade.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C6 \\u2014 Efici\\u00eancia operacional + redu\\u00e7\\u00e3o de retrabalho \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 (CR\\u00cdTICO)\\nMin: 10 fontes. Este \\u00e9 o elo MAIS FRACO da tese.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Workday Hanover Research AI rework 40% time saved\\n  \\u2022 KPMG University of Melbourne AI work errors 48340 study\\n  \\u2022 Microsoft Work Trend Index 2024 2025 2026\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic AI Fluency Index 9830 conversations iteration\\n  \\u2022 generative AI productivity rework reduction peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 LLM output quality verification rework cost\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando IA aumenta retrabalho total, gera\\nfalsa produtividade, ou onde tempo economizado \\u00e9 compensado por corre\\u00e7\\u00e3o.\\nATEN\\u00c7\\u00c3O: distinguir estat\\u00edsticas sobre o PROBLEMA (uso desestruturado)\\nde estat\\u00edsticas sobre o EFEITO da interven\\u00e7\\u00e3o (uso estruturado).\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C7 \\u2014 Onboarding e workflows reutiliz\\u00e1veis \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 4 fontes.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 knowledge worker onboarding ROI study\\n  \\u2022 Building Second Brain GTD productivity peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 reusable workflow corporate training effectiveness\\n  \\u2022 playbook documentation team productivity meta-analysis\\nFalseamento alvo: onboarding estruturado n\\u00e3o correlaciona com produtividade\\nduradoura ou produz fadiga de sistema.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C8 \\u2014 Repurpose cross-platform de conte\\u00fado \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 4 fontes.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 cross-media content repurposing strategy peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 content modularization multi-platform marketing\\n  \\u2022 one-source many-channel content reuse academic\\nFalseamento alvo: repurpose dilui qualidade percebida do canal prim\\u00e1rio.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C9 \\u2014 Recorte brasileiro \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5 fontes. Queries em PT-BR.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 SBC ASAG prompt engineering portugu\\u00eas Brasil\\n  \\u2022 SciELO IA generativa letramento educa\\u00e7\\u00e3o Brasil\\n  \\u2022 IA generativa produtividade trabalho Brasil pesquisa acad\\u00eamica\\n  \\u2022 PL 2338 2023 intelig\\u00eancia artificial Brasil discuss\\u00e3o acad\\u00eamica\\n  \\u2022 USP FGV Insper IA generativa estudo emp\\u00edrico\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos brasileiros mostrando padr\\u00f5es diferentes do\\nrecorte global, ou inadequa\\u00e7\\u00e3o de frameworks anglo-sax\\u00f5es ao contexto BR.\\n\\n[CRIT\\u00c9RIO DE QUALIDADE DO TURNO]\\n- TOTAL alvo: 50-80 fontes.\\n- Cobertura: 9 clusters, nenhum vazio.\\n- Falseamento: cada cluster com m\\u00ednimo 1 fonte contr\\u00e1ria.\\n- Qualidade > quantidade. Melhor 50 fontes verificadas que 100 incertas.\\n- Idioma do output: PT-BR ou EN, consistente.\\n- Formato: array JSON \\u00fanico, um objeto por fonte, sem texto adicional.\\n\\n[ENTREGA]\\nRetorne apenas o array JSON. Sem pr\\u00f3logo, sem ep\\u00edlogo, sem coment\\u00e1rios\\nfora do schema. O autor importar\\u00e1 para uma planilha estruturada.\\n\\n=========================================================\\nFIM DO CMD\\n=========================================================\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\n# write CMD as wrapped multi-cell content\\nws.cell(row=3, column=1, value=cmd_text)\\nws.cell(row=3, column=1).font = Font(name='Courier New', size=9)\\nws.cell(row=3, column=1).alignment = Alignment(wrap_text=True, vertical='top')\\nws.row_dimensions[3].height = 1500\\n\\n# =====================================================================\\n# Save\\n# =====================================================================\\nout = \\\"/home/claude/build/pesquisa_tese_estrutura_conta_IA.xlsx\\\"\\nwb.save(out)\\nprint(f\\\"saved {out}\\\")\\nprint(f\\\"sheets: {wb.sheetnames}\\\")\\nPYEOF\\npython3 build_xlsx.py\", \"description\": \"Build the complete filled XLS with 14 sheets\"}, \"message\": \"Build the complete filled XLS with 14 sheets\", \"integration_name\": null, \"integration_icon_url\": null, \"icon_name\": \"commandLine\", \"context\": null, \"display_content\": {\"type\": \"json_block\", \"json_block\": \"{\\\"language\\\": \\\"bash\\\", \\\"code\\\": \\\"mkdir -p /home/claude/build && cd /home/claude/build\\\\ncat > build_xlsx.py << 'PYEOF'\\\\nfrom openpyxl import Workbook, load_workbook\\\\nfrom openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side\\\\nfrom copy import copy\\\\n\\\\n# Load original to preserve seed content\\\\norig = load_workbook(\\\\\\\"/mnt/user-data/uploads/ai_research_framework_template.xlsx\\\\\\\")\\\\nwb = Workbook()\\\\nwb.remove(wb.active)\\\\n\\\\n# Style helpers\\\\nTITLE_FONT = Font(name='Arial', size=14, bold=True, color='FFFFFF')\\\\nTITLE_FILL = PatternFill('solid', start_color='1F4E78')\\\\nSUBTITLE_FONT = Font(name='Arial', size=11, bold=True, color='1F4E78')\\\\nHEADER_FONT = Font(name='Arial', size=10, bold=True, color='FFFFFF')\\\\nHEADER_FILL = PatternFill('solid', start_color='2E75B6')\\\\nSECTION_FILL = PatternFill('solid', start_color='D9E1F2')\\\\nSECTION_FONT = Font(name='Arial', size=10, bold=True)\\\\nBODY_FONT = Font(name='Arial', size=10)\\\\nWRAP = Alignment(wrap_text=True, vertical='top')\\\\nCENTER = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)\\\\nTHIN = Side(border_style='thin', color='B4B4B4')\\\\nBORDER = Border(left=THIN, right=THIN, top=THIN, bottom=THIN)\\\\nDECISION_FILL = PatternFill('solid', start_color='E2EFDA')\\\\nWARNING_FILL = PatternFill('solid', start_color='FFF2CC')\\\\nGAP_FILL = PatternFill('solid', start_color='FCE4D6')\\\\n\\\\ndef title_row(ws, row, text, span=6):\\\\n    ws.cell(row=row, column=1, value=text).font = TITLE_FONT\\\\n    ws.cell(row=row, column=1).fill = TITLE_FILL\\\\n    ws.cell(row=row, column=1).alignment = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center')\\\\n    ws.merge_cells(start_row=row, start_column=1, end_row=row, end_column=span)\\\\n    ws.row_dimensions[row].height = 26\\\\n\\\\ndef header_row(ws, row, headers):\\\\n    for i, h in enumerate(headers, 1):\\\\n        c = ws.cell(row=row, column=i, value=h)\\\\n        c.font = HEADER_FONT\\\\n        c.fill = HEADER_FILL\\\\n        c.alignment = CENTER\\\\n        c.border = BORDER\\\\n    ws.row_dimensions[row].height = 30\\\\n\\\\ndef body_cell(ws, row, col, value, fill=None, bold=False):\\\\n    c = ws.cell(row=row, column=col, value=value)\\\\n    c.font = Font(name='Arial', size=10, bold=bold)\\\\n    c.alignment = WRAP\\\\n    c.border = BORDER\\\\n    if fill:\\\\n        c.fill = fill\\\\n    return c\\\\n\\\\ndef section_row(ws, row, text, span=6):\\\\n    ws.cell(row=row, column=1, value=text).font = SECTION_FONT\\\\n    ws.cell(row=row, column=1).fill = SECTION_FILL\\\\n    ws.cell(row=row, column=1).alignment = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center')\\\\n    ws.merge_cells(start_row=row, start_column=1, end_row=row, end_column=span)\\\\n    ws.row_dimensions[row].height = 22\\\\n\\\\ndef setcols(ws, widths):\\\\n    for i, w in enumerate(widths, 1):\\\\n        ws.column_dimensions[chr(64+i)].width = w\\\\n\\\\n# =====================================================================\\\\n# SHEET 00 \\\\u2014 LEIA PRIMEIRO\\\\n# mestre \\\\u2014 pipeline de pesquisa, decis\\\\u00e3o, s\\\\u00edntese e publica\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o\\\\\\\").font = BODY_FONT\\\\nws.cell(row=2, column=2).alignment = WRAP\\\\n\\\\nintro = [\\\\n Registrar para transpar\\\\u00eancia.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n]\\\\nr = 3\\\\nfor k, v in classes:\\\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 1, k, fill=SECTION_FILL, bold=True)\\\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 2, v)\\\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 50\\\\n    r += 1\\\\n\\\\n# Pr\\\\u00e9-findings do scan interno\\\\nsection_row(ws, r + 1, \\\\\\\"PR\\\\u00c9-FINDINGS DO SCAN INTERNO (TURNO ANTERIOR)\\\\\\\", span=2)\\\\nr += 2\\\\nprefindings = [\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Pr\\\\u00e9-finding 1\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"O notes file j\\\\u00e1 \\\\u00e9 um documento auditorial parcial. A auditoria deve submeter o notes file ao mesmo rigor que aplica a fontes externas.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Pr\\\\u00e9-finding 2\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Toda claim de produtividade no .numbers e no aigovbrasil_v3_exec \\\\u00e9 self-reported, n=1, sem controle. Classificar como 'self-reported operational claims', n\\\\u00e3o como 'evidence of productivity gain'.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Pr\\\\u00e9-finding 3\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Empower V4 \\\\u00e9 o \\\\u00fanico instrumento mensur\\\\u00e1vel falsific\\\\u00e1vel no corpus. Candidato natural para valida\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o emp\\\\u00edrica do estudo.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Pr\\\\u00e9-finding 4\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"O lado outcome da f\\\\u00f3rmula tem a evid\\\\u00eancia mais fraca. As estat\\\\u00edsticas Workday/KPMG descrevem o PROBLEMA (uso desestruturado), n\\\\u00e3o o EFEITO da interven\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o (uso estruturado). C6 deve verificar isso na fonte prim\\\\u00e1ria.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Pr\\\\u00e9-finding 5\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"O corpus operacional (24 skills, m\\\\u00e9todo 9-fases, suite multi-camada) \\\\u00e9 genuinamente incomum. Poss\\\\u00edvel claim de novidade \\\\u2014 mas separado da claim de produtividade.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n]\\\\nfor k, v in prefindings:\\\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 1, k, fill=WARNING_FILL, bold=True)\\\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 2, v)\\\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 55\\\\n    r += 1\\\\n\\\\n# =====================================================================\\\\n# SHEET 12 \\\\u2014 REPURPOSE PIPELINE\\\\n# =====================================================================\\\\nws = wb.create_sheet(\\\\\\\"12_REPURPOSE_PIPELINE\\\\\\\")\\\\nsetcols(ws, [18, 22, 38, 30, 14, 18])\\\\ntitle_row(ws, 1, \\\\\\\"PIPELINE DE PUBLICA\\\\u00c7\\\\u00c3O MULTI-CANAL\\\\\\\")\\\\nheader_row(ws, 3, [\\\\\\\"Canal\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Formato\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\u00c2ngulo / Mensagem central\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"CTA\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Prioridade\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Skill envolvida\\\\\\\"])\\\\n\\\\nrepurpose = [\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"GitHub\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Reposit\\\\u00f3rio + README + dataset + XLS\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Replication kit: tese + framework + planilha + CMD + scripts. Source of truth t\\\\u00e9cnica.\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Star / fork / replicar\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"1 \\\\u2014 Backbone\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"cmd-01-pps + project-packager\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Medium\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Long-form article\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Tese + contexto + m\\\\u00e9todo + evid\\\\u00eancias + limita\\\\u00e7\\\\u00f5es + framework aberto. Estilo aigovbrasil \\\\u2014 operacional, s\\\\u00f3brio, evid\\\\u00eancia-led.\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Comment / connect\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"2 \\\\u2014 Distribui\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"FORGE (carrossel) + frankwatching-editor\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"X (Twitter)\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Thread (uma claim por post)\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Quebra do artigo em 8-12 posts. Cada um carrega uma evid\\\\u00eancia ou framework.\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Bookmark / follow\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"3 \\\\u2014 Discovery\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"live-prompt-pro-converter\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Newsletter\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Email digest com link para Medium e GitHub\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Resumo executivo + 1 insight central + link para o estudo completo. Reuso direto do abstract.\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Read full study\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"2 \\\\u2014 Funil pr\\\\u00f3prio\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"frankwatching-editor\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"YouTube\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Walkthrough do framework (15-20 min)\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Demo pr\\\\u00e1tica da planilha + CMD + s\\\\u00edntese. Visual.\\\\\\\",\\\\n     \\\\\\\"Subscribe\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"4 \\\\u2014 Fase 2\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"FORGE (assets visuais)\\\\\\\"),\\\\n]\\\\nr = 4\\\\nfor rp in repurpose:\\\\n    for i, v in enumerate(rp, 1):\\\\n        body_cell(ws, r, i, v, bold=(i == 1))\\\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 65\\\\n    r += 1\\\\n\\\\n# Depend\\\\u00eancias\\\\nsection_row(ws, r + 1, \\\\\\\"ORDEM DE PUBLICA\\\\u00c7\\\\u00c3O RECOMENDADA\\\\\\\", span=6)\\\\nr += 2\\\\norder_items = [\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Passo 1\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"GitHub: publicar o reposit\\\\u00f3rio com XLS + CMD + scripts + draft do artigo em README. Marca a data.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Passo 2\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Medium: publicar long-form com link para o GitHub. Linka como 'replication kit'.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Passo 3\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"LinkedIn: post anal\\\\u00edtico com link para Medium + carrossel resumindo achados.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Passo 4\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"X thread: 8-12 tweets quebrando o estudo, com link no \\\\u00faltimo para Medium.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Passo 5\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Newsletter: digest da semana, primeira posi\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n    (\\\\\\\"Passo 6 (opcional)\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"YouTube: walkthrough ap\\\\u00f3s pelo menos 1 ciclo de feedback p\\\\u00fablico.\\\\\\\"),\\\\n]\\\\nfor k, v in order_items:\\\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 1, k, fill=DECISION_FILL, bold=True)\\\\n    ws.merge_cells(start_row=r, start_column=2, end_row=r, end_column=6)\\\\n    body_cell(ws, r, 2, v)\\\\n    ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 28\\\\n    r += 1\\\\n\\\\n# =====================================================================\\\\n# SHEET 13 \\\\u2014 CMD PRONTO\\\\n# =====================================================================\\\\nws = wb.create_sheet(\\\\\\\"13_CMD_PRONTO\\\\\\\")\\\\nsetcols(ws, [120])\\\\ntitle_row(ws, 1, \\\\\\\"CMD PRONTO \\\\u2014 COLE NO WIDE RESEARCH\\\\\\\", span=1)\\\\n\\\\ncmd_text = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"=========================================================\\\\nCMD PARA WIDE RESEARCH MODE \\\\u2014 TESE ESTRUTURA DE CONTA IA\\\\nVers\\\\u00e3o 1.0 \\\\u00b7 Maio 2026 \\\\u00b7 Para: claude.ai \\\\u2192 modo Wide Research\\\\n=========================================================\\\\n\\\\n[PAPEL]\\\\nVoc\\\\u00ea \\\\u00e9 um analista de pesquisa s\\\\u00eanior, auditor metodol\\\\u00f3gico e agente de\\\\ns\\\\u00edntese de evid\\\\u00eancias. Sua miss\\\\u00e3o N\\\\u00c3O \\\\u00e9 validar a tese do autor \\\\u2014 \\\\u00e9\\\\ninvestigar, pressionar, testar, refinar e desafiar com rigor metodol\\\\u00f3gico,\\\\nracioc\\\\u00ednio causal e separa\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o rigorosa entre evid\\\\u00eancia, infer\\\\u00eancia, hip\\\\u00f3tese\\\\ne opini\\\\u00e3o. Trate fontes confirmat\\\\u00f3rias com escrut\\\\u00ednio NORMAL e fontes\\\\ncontr\\\\u00e1rias com escrut\\\\u00ednio mais LENIENTE (assimetria intencional para\\\\ncombater vi\\\\u00e9s de confirma\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o).\\\\n\\\\n[TESE A INVESTIGAR]\\\\n\\\\\\\"Contas de IA profissionalmente estruturadas \\\\u2014 combinando letramento em IA,\\\\npersonaliza\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o persistente, skills reutiliz\\\\u00e1veis (SKILL.md), frameworks\\\\ndetermin\\\\u00edsticos e conectores (MCP) \\\\u2014 produzem maior efici\\\\u00eancia operacional\\\\ne menor retrabalho do que contas n\\\\u00e3o estruturadas.\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\nF\\\\u00f3rmula: L + P + S + FD + C  \\\\u2192  \\\\u2191 produtividade,  \\\\u2193 retrabalho\\\\nOnde:\\\\n- L = letramento em IA\\\\n- P = personaliza\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o da conta\\\\n- S = Skills / SKILL.md\\\\n- FD = frameworks determin\\\\u00edsticos\\\\n- C = conectores (MCP)\\\\n\\\\n[MISS\\\\u00c3O]\\\\nInvestigar 9 clusters de pesquisa, retornando entre 5 e 10 fontes por cluster\\\\n(meta total: 50-80 fontes). Para cada fonte, preencher TODOS os campos do\\\\nschema abaixo. N\\\\u00e3o inventar. N\\\\u00e3o preencher campos sem evid\\\\u00eancia verific\\\\u00e1vel.\\\\n\\\\n[OUTPUT SCHEMA \\\\u2014 UM OBJETO JSON POR FONTE]\\\\n{\\\\n  \\\\\\\"cluster_id\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"C1\\\\\\\",                     // C1..C9\\\\n  \\\\\\\"source_id\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"S005\\\\\\\",                    // sequencial a partir de S005\\\\n  \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"authors_or_org\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"year\\\\\\\": 2025,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"region\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"US|Global|EU|Brasil|Outro\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"source_type\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"peer-reviewed paper | preprint | official docs | repo | industry report | book | thesis\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"url\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"https://...\\\\\\\",                   // verific\\\\u00e1vel\\\\n  \\\\\\\"methodology\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"1-2 frases descrevendo design do estudo\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"sample_or_dataset\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"n=... ou descri\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"main_claim\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"1-2 frases\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"relevance_to_thesis\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"1-2 frases ligando \\\\u00e0 f\\\\u00f3rmula L+P+S+FD+C\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"similarity_topic_0_5\\\\\\\": 4,              // overlap conceitual\\\\n  \\\\\\\"similarity_method_0_5\\\\\\\": 3,             // overlap metodol\\\\u00f3gico\\\\n  \\\\\\\"similarity_tooling_0_5\\\\\\\": 4,            // overlap de ferramentas\\\\n  \\\\\\\"similarity_outcome_0_5\\\\\\\": 3,            // overlap de outcome\\\\n  \\\\\\\"similarity_context_0_5\\\\\\\": 2,            // overlap de contexto (individual/equipe, BR/US)\\\\n  \\\\\\\"evidence_type\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"direct | inferred | hypothesis | opinion | contextual\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"contradicts_thesis\\\\\\\": false,            // true se a fonte enfraquece ou contradiz\\\\n  \\\\\\\"limitations\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"1-2 frases sobre limita\\\\u00e7\\\\u00f5es da fonte\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"confidence_0_5\\\\\\\": 4,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"notes\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"opcional, contexto adicional\\\\\\\"\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\n[REGRAS]\\\\n1. N\\\\u00c3O INVENTAR. Se n\\\\u00e3o houver fonte confirm\\\\u00e1vel com URL, n\\\\u00e3o retornar.\\\\n2. CADA CLUSTER exige pelo menos 1 fonte com contradicts_thesis=true OU\\\\n   evid\\\\u00eancia emp\\\\u00edrica enfraquecendo a tese.\\\\n3. PRIORIDADE de fontes: peer-reviewed > documenta\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o oficial >\\\\n   reposit\\\\u00f3rio > relat\\\\u00f3rio industrial > artigo de blog t\\\\u00e9cnico cred\\\\u00edvel.\\\\n4. SCORE ponderado de similaridade = topic*0.30 + method*0.20 + tooling*0.20\\\\n   + outcome*0.15 + context*0.15 (calculado pelo autor depois \\\\u2014 voc\\\\u00ea s\\\\u00f3\\\\n   preenche os 5 sub-scores).\\\\n5. CRIT\\\\u00c9RIO M\\\\u00cdNIMO de inclus\\\\u00e3o: score ponderado \\\\u2265 40%. Se voc\\\\u00ea estimar que\\\\n   ficaria abaixo disso, ainda inclua mas marque evidence_type=\\\\\\\"contextual\\\\\\\".\\\\n6. PARA C9 (Brasil), priorizar: SBC (Sociedade Brasileira de Computa\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o),\\\\n   SciELO, reposit\\\\u00f3rios universit\\\\u00e1rios brasileiros (USP, UFRJ, UFMG, FGV,\\\\n   Insper, Unicamp), portal da CAPES.\\\\n7. SE DUAS FONTES dizem a mesma coisa, manter apenas a prim\\\\u00e1ria.\\\\n8. CITA\\\\u00c7\\\\u00d5ES diretas s\\\\u00f3 se forem essenciais \\\\u2014 preferir par\\\\u00e1frase.\\\\n\\\\n[OS 9 CLUSTERS]\\\\n\\\\n\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550 C1 \\\\u2014 Letramento em IA + Prompt Engineering (n\\\\u00facleo) \\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\nMin: 7 fontes. Inclui Knoth et al. 2024 (j\\\\u00e1 validado) como ponto de partida.\\\\nQueries em ingl\\\\u00eas:\\\\n  \\\\u2022 \\\\\\\"AI literacy prompt engineering\\\\\\\" review 2024 2025\\\\n  \\\\u2022 \\\\\\\"AI fluency\\\\\\\" framework empirical study Anthropic\\\\n  \\\\u2022 prompt structure productivity LLM peer-reviewed\\\\n  \\\\u2022 prompt quality user expertise correlation\\\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando que prompting estruturado N\\\\u00c3O melhora\\\\noutput ou tem efeito nulo / inconsistente.\\\\n\\\\n\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550 C2 \\\\u2014 Personaliza\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o e contexto persistente \\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\nMin: 6 fontes.\\\\nQueries:\\\\n  \\\\u2022 LLM personalization system prompts performance\\\\n  \\\\u2022 custom instructions ChatGPT Claude benchmark\\\\n  \\\\u2022 persistent context user productivity LLM\\\\n  \\\\u2022 memory augmented LLM task completion study\\\\nFalseamento alvo: regress\\\\u00e3o de personaliza\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o em tarefas fora da distribui\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o\\\\nou degrada\\\\u00e7\\\\u00e3o por overfitting de contexto.\\\\n\\\\n\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550 C3 \\\\u2014 Skills reutiliz\\\\u00e1veis / SKILL.md / agentes modulares \\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\nMin: 7 fontes. I'm mapping out the response structure now \\u2014 three critical decisions with reasoning, the pipeline flow from F0 through F7, the nine clusters organized hierarchically with minimal sources, a practical six-step usage guide, and then the complete command ready to copy.\", \"summaries\": [{\"summary\": \"Estruturando resposta estrat\\u00e9gica e entregando arquivos prontos.\"}, {\"summary\": \"Orchestrating strategic narrative with CMD prominence and XLS delivery.\"}, {\"summary\": \"Architected comprehensive research pipeline with strategic decisions and delivery-ready implementation.\"}], \"cut_off\": false, \"truncated\": false, \"alternative_display_type\": null, \"signature\": \"\"}, {\"start_timestamp\": \"2026-05-16T09:58:36.386752Z\", \"stop_timestamp\": \"2026-05-16T09:59:56.207517Z\", \"flags\": null, \"type\": \"text\", \"text\": \"Tudo pronto. Antes da entrega, deixo registrado o racioc\\u00ednio das tr\\u00eas decis\\u00f5es que eu tomei por voc\\u00ea \\u2014 porque elas determinam o resto do pipeline e voc\\u00ea deve aceit\\u00e1-las ou contest\\u00e1-las antes de disparar o Wide Research.\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Decis\\u00e3o 1 \\u2014 N (quantas fontes coletar)**\\n\\nRecomenda\\u00e7\\u00e3o: **60 fontes** (faixa operacional 50-80), distribu\\u00eddas em 9 clusters com 5-10 fontes cada. Por qu\\u00ea n\\u00e3o 30 e por qu\\u00ea n\\u00e3o 100+:\\n\\n```\\n30 fontes  \\u2192  Insuficiente. Voc\\u00ea quer publicar como \\\"benchmark\\\", n\\u00e3o como\\n              \\\"ensaio com refer\\u00eancias\\\". Abaixo de 30 a planilha de\\n              similaridade n\\u00e3o tem densidade para ranqueamento honesto.\\n\\n60 fontes  \\u2192  Defens\\u00edvel. Cada cluster recebe cobertura m\\u00ednima, sobra\\n              margem para descarte (~20% das fontes caem abaixo do\\n              corte de 40% de similaridade). Wide Research consegue\\n              entregar em um \\u00fanico batch.\\n\\n100+       \\u2192  Infla\\u00e7\\u00e3o. Voc\\u00ea \\u00e9 solo operator. Mais fontes \\u2260 artigo\\n              melhor \\u2014 significa mais s\\u00edntese, mais auditoria, mais\\n              tempo perdido em fontes redundantes. Reserve para\\n              segunda rodada SE a s\\u00edntese revelar cluster fraco.\\n```\\n\\nA regra real \\u00e9: **qualidade > quantidade**. Melhor 50 fontes verificadas com falseamento expl\\u00edcito por cluster do que 100 fontes superficiais que d\\u00e3o ilus\\u00e3o de cobertura.\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Decis\\u00e3o 2 \\u2014 Opus 4.7 ou Sonnet 4.6 para a pesquisa**\\n\\n```\\nOnde est\\u00e1 o trabalho realmente dif\\u00edcil?\\n\\u251c\\u2500\\u2500 Decidir o qu\\u00ea pesquisar      \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  J\\u00e1 feito. Opus.\\n\\u251c\\u2500\\u2500 Avaliar metodologia das fontes \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  Opus (este chat).\\n\\u251c\\u2500\\u2500 Detectar contradi\\u00e7\\u00f5es        \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  Opus (este chat).\\n\\u251c\\u2500\\u2500 Auditar vi\\u00e9s de confirma\\u00e7\\u00e3o  \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  Opus (este chat).\\n\\u251c\\u2500\\u2500 Sintetizar 12 se\\u00e7\\u00f5es finais  \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  Opus (este chat).\\n\\u2514\\u2500\\u2500 Coletar fontes em paralelo   \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  Wide Research (caixa-preta).\\n```\\n\\nWide Research \\u00e9 uma ferramenta de varredura paralela. O valor dela est\\u00e1 em **paralelismo**, n\\u00e3o em racioc\\u00ednio individual de cada agente \\u2014 cada agente faz busca + extra\\u00e7\\u00e3o estruturada, tarefa que Sonnet/Haiku j\\u00e1 executam bem. Voc\\u00ea n\\u00e3o escolhe o modelo do Wide Research; ele usa o que usar, e o que importa \\u00e9 a qualidade do CMD que voc\\u00ea manda.\\n\\nA decis\\u00e3o correta \\u00e9: **Opus aqui para tudo que exige julgamento, Wide Research apenas para a fase F3 de coleta**. N\\u00e3o tente rodar a pesquisa toda em modo Wide \\u2014 voc\\u00ea perde a auditoria.\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Decis\\u00e3o 3 \\u2014 Ordem de publica\\u00e7\\u00e3o**\\n\\nGitHub primeiro, n\\u00e3o Medium. Raz\\u00e3o: voc\\u00ea quer credibilidade t\\u00e9cnica como \\u00e2ngulo diferenciador (alinhado ao posicionamento do aigovbrasil \\u2014 \\\"operator depth, not influencer reach\\\"). GitHub publicado **antes** do Medium permite que o artigo cite o replication kit. O contr\\u00e1rio for\\u00e7a a republicar.\\n\\n```\\nSequ\\u00eancia:\\n1. GitHub  \\u2192  reposit\\u00f3rio com XLS + CMD + scripts + draft em README\\n2. Medium  \\u2192  long-form com link para GitHub como \\\"replication kit\\\"\\n3. LinkedIn \\u2192  post anal\\u00edtico + carrossel com link para Medium\\n4. X       \\u2192  thread quebrando o estudo (8-12 posts)\\n5. Newsletter \\u2192 digest com primeira posi\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\n6. YouTube  \\u2192  walkthrough (fase 2, depois de feedback p\\u00fablico)\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Pipeline completo F0 \\u2192 F7**\\n\\n```\\nF0 \\u00b7 Decis\\u00e3o estrat\\u00e9gica      \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  CONCLU\\u00cdDA neste turno (aba 01)\\nF1 \\u00b7 Trabalho ao reverso      \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  PARCIAL \\u2014 abas 02, 04, 05 preenchidas\\nF2 \\u00b7 Scan interno MECE        \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  CONCLU\\u00cdDA (turno anterior + aba 11)\\nF3 \\u00b7 Wide Research            \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  PR\\u00d3XIMO PASSO \\u2014 voc\\u00ea cola o CMD\\nF4 \\u00b7 Popular o XLS            \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  voc\\u00ea cola o JSON na aba 07\\nF5 \\u00b7 S\\u00edntese auditorial       \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  volta para este chat, gera 12 se\\u00e7\\u00f5es\\nF6 \\u00b7 Revis\\u00e3o humana           \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  voc\\u00ea decide o que publica\\nF7 \\u00b7 Repurpose multi-canal    \\u2500\\u2500\\u2192  GitHub \\u2192 Medium \\u2192 LinkedIn \\u2192 X \\u2192 YT\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Como usar \\u2014 6 passos pr\\u00e1ticos**\\n\\n```\\n1. Abra a planilha. Leia a aba 00_LEIA_PRIMEIRO.\\n2. Confirme as 8 decis\\u00f5es na aba 01_DECISOES (ou contest\\u00e1-las).\\n3. V\\u00e1 na aba 13_CMD_PRONTO. Copie TODO o conte\\u00fado da c\\u00e9lula.\\n4. Abra claude.ai em modo Wide Research. Cole. Dispare.\\n5. Quando voltar o JSON, cole na aba 07_LOG_FONTES (a partir da linha 8).\\n   Os scores ponderados se calculam sozinhos (f\\u00f3rmula j\\u00e1 embutida).\\n6. Volte aqui no chat e diga \\\"iniciar F5\\\". Eu rodo a s\\u00edntese auditorial.\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n**O CMD para colar (tamb\\u00e9m est\\u00e1 na aba 13 da planilha)**\\n\\nColoco aqui completo para voc\\u00ea copiar sem precisar abrir o arquivo. \\u00c9 bil\\u00edngue por design: instru\\u00e7\\u00f5es e regras em PT-BR para voc\\u00ea verificar, queries em EN porque a literatura est\\u00e1 em EN, com C9 dedicado ao recorte brasileiro em PT-BR.\\n\\n```text\\n=========================================================\\nCMD PARA WIDE RESEARCH MODE \\u2014 TESE ESTRUTURA DE CONTA IA\\nVers\\u00e3o 1.0 \\u00b7 Maio 2026\\n=========================================================\\n\\n[PAPEL]\\nVoc\\u00ea \\u00e9 um analista de pesquisa s\\u00eanior, auditor metodol\\u00f3gico e agente\\nde s\\u00edntese de evid\\u00eancias. Sua miss\\u00e3o N\\u00c3O \\u00e9 validar a tese do autor \\u2014\\n\\u00e9 investigar, pressionar, testar, refinar e desafiar com rigor\\nmetodol\\u00f3gico, racioc\\u00ednio causal e separa\\u00e7\\u00e3o rigorosa entre evid\\u00eancia,\\ninfer\\u00eancia, hip\\u00f3tese e opini\\u00e3o. Trate fontes confirmat\\u00f3rias com\\nescrut\\u00ednio NORMAL e fontes contr\\u00e1rias com escrut\\u00ednio mais LENIENTE\\n(assimetria intencional para combater vi\\u00e9s de confirma\\u00e7\\u00e3o).\\n\\n[TESE A INVESTIGAR]\\n\\\"Contas de IA profissionalmente estruturadas \\u2014 combinando letramento\\nem IA, personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o persistente, skills reutiliz\\u00e1veis (SKILL.md),\\nframeworks determin\\u00edsticos e conectores (MCP) \\u2014 produzem maior\\nefici\\u00eancia operacional e menor retrabalho do que contas n\\u00e3o\\nestruturadas.\\\"\\n\\nF\\u00f3rmula: L + P + S + FD + C  \\u2192  \\u2191 produtividade,  \\u2193 retrabalho\\nOnde:\\n- L  = letramento em IA\\n- P  = personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o da conta\\n- S  = Skills / SKILL.md\\n- FD = frameworks determin\\u00edsticos\\n- C  = conectores (MCP)\\n\\n[MISS\\u00c3O]\\nInvestigar 9 clusters de pesquisa, retornando entre 5 e 10 fontes\\npor cluster (meta total: 50-80 fontes). Para cada fonte, preencher\\nTODOS os campos do schema abaixo. N\\u00e3o inventar. N\\u00e3o preencher campos\\nsem evid\\u00eancia verific\\u00e1vel.\\n\\n[OUTPUT SCHEMA \\u2014 UM OBJETO JSON POR FONTE]\\n{\\n  \\\"cluster_id\\\": \\\"C1\\\",\\n  \\\"source_id\\\": \\\"S005\\\",\\n  \\\"title\\\": \\\"...\\\",\\n  \\\"authors_or_org\\\": \\\"...\\\",\\n  \\\"year\\\": 2025,\\n  \\\"region\\\": \\\"US|Global|EU|Brasil|Outro\\\",\\n  \\\"source_type\\\": \\\"peer-reviewed paper | preprint | official docs | repo | industry report | book | thesis\\\",\\n  \\\"url\\\": \\\"https://...\\\",\\n  \\\"methodology\\\": \\\"1-2 frases descrevendo design do estudo\\\",\\n  \\\"sample_or_dataset\\\": \\\"n=... ou descri\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\\",\\n  \\\"main_claim\\\": \\\"1-2 frases\\\",\\n  \\\"relevance_to_thesis\\\": \\\"1-2 frases ligando \\u00e0 f\\u00f3rmula L+P+S+FD+C\\\",\\n  \\\"similarity_topic_0_5\\\": 4,\\n  \\\"similarity_method_0_5\\\": 3,\\n  \\\"similarity_tooling_0_5\\\": 4,\\n  \\\"similarity_outcome_0_5\\\": 3,\\n  \\\"similarity_context_0_5\\\": 2,\\n  \\\"evidence_type\\\": \\\"direct | inferred | hypothesis | opinion | contextual\\\",\\n  \\\"contradicts_thesis\\\": false,\\n  \\\"limitations\\\": \\\"1-2 frases\\\",\\n  \\\"confidence_0_5\\\": 4,\\n  \\\"notes\\\": \\\"opcional\\\"\\n}\\n\\n[REGRAS]\\n1. N\\u00c3O INVENTAR. Sem URL verific\\u00e1vel, n\\u00e3o retornar.\\n2. CADA CLUSTER exige no m\\u00ednimo 1 fonte com contradicts_thesis=true\\n   ou evid\\u00eancia emp\\u00edrica enfraquecendo a tese.\\n3. PRIORIDADE: peer-reviewed > documenta\\u00e7\\u00e3o oficial > reposit\\u00f3rio >\\n   relat\\u00f3rio industrial > artigo t\\u00e9cnico cred\\u00edvel.\\n4. Sub-scores 0-5 em cada uma das 5 dimens\\u00f5es de similaridade; o\\n   score ponderado \\u00e9 calculado pelo autor (topic 30% + method 20%\\n   + tooling 20% + outcome 15% + context 15%).\\n5. INCLUS\\u00c3O M\\u00cdNIMA: score ponderado estimado \\u2265 40%. Se abaixo,\\n   marcar evidence_type=\\\"contextual\\\".\\n6. PARA C9 (Brasil): priorizar SBC, SciELO, USP, FGV, Insper,\\n   Unicamp, UFRJ, UFMG, CAPES.\\n7. Se duas fontes dizem o mesmo, manter apenas a prim\\u00e1ria.\\n8. Preferir par\\u00e1frase a cita\\u00e7\\u00e3o direta.\\n\\n[OS 9 CLUSTERS]\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C1 \\u2014 Letramento em IA + Prompt Engineering (n\\u00facleo) \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7. Inclui Knoth et al. 2024 (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI literacy prompt engineering\\\" review 2024 2025\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI fluency\\\" framework empirical study Anthropic\\n  \\u2022 prompt structure productivity LLM peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 prompt quality user expertise correlation\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando que prompting estruturado N\\u00c3O\\nmelhora output ou tem efeito nulo / inconsistente.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C2 \\u2014 Personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o e contexto persistente \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 6.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 LLM personalization system prompts performance\\n  \\u2022 custom instructions ChatGPT Claude benchmark\\n  \\u2022 persistent context user productivity LLM\\n  \\u2022 memory augmented LLM task completion study\\nFalseamento alvo: regress\\u00e3o de personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o em tarefas fora da\\ndistribui\\u00e7\\u00e3o ou degrada\\u00e7\\u00e3o por overfitting de contexto.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C3 \\u2014 Skills reutiliz\\u00e1veis / SKILL.md / agentes modulares \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7. Inclui Anthropic docs (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic Claude Skills SKILL.md documentation\\n  \\u2022 reusable prompt templates modular LLM workflow\\n  \\u2022 LangGraph AutoGen CrewAI productivity comparison\\n  \\u2022 function calling tool use reusable patterns enterprise\\nFalseamento alvo: reprodutibilidade fraca ou inconsist\\u00eancia entre\\nexecu\\u00e7\\u00f5es de workflows baseados em skills.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C4 \\u2014 Frameworks determin\\u00edsticos / workflows com gates \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 deterministic LLM workflow DSPy LangChain benchmark\\n  \\u2022 constrained decoding output quality study\\n  \\u2022 gate-based pipeline LLM consistency\\n  \\u2022 structured workflow vs free-form prompting outcome\\nFalseamento alvo: workflows determin\\u00edsticos perdem performance em\\ntarefas abertas, criativas ou explorat\\u00f3rias.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C5 \\u2014 Conectores / MCP / tool use \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5. Inclui MCP docs (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Model Context Protocol MCP adoption study\\n  \\u2022 tool use LLM error rate latency benchmark\\n  \\u2022 function calling productivity benchmark enterprise\\n  \\u2022 external tool integration LLM workflow efficiency\\nFalseamento alvo: custo de fric\\u00e7\\u00e3o, lat\\u00eancia ou erro de MCP supera\\no ganho de produtividade.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C6 \\u2014 Efici\\u00eancia operacional + redu\\u00e7\\u00e3o de retrabalho \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 CR\\u00cdTICO\\nMin: 10. Este \\u00e9 o elo MAIS FRACO da tese.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Workday Hanover Research AI rework 40% time saved\\n  \\u2022 KPMG University of Melbourne AI work errors 48340 study\\n  \\u2022 Microsoft Work Trend Index 2024 2025 2026\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic AI Fluency Index 9830 conversations iteration\\n  \\u2022 generative AI productivity rework reduction peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 LLM output quality verification rework cost\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando IA aumenta retrabalho total,\\ngera falsa produtividade, ou onde tempo economizado \\u00e9 compensado\\npor corre\\u00e7\\u00e3o. ATEN\\u00c7\\u00c3O: distinguir estat\\u00edsticas sobre o PROBLEMA\\n(uso desestruturado) de estat\\u00edsticas sobre o EFEITO da interven\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\n(uso estruturado).\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C7 \\u2014 Onboarding e workflows reutiliz\\u00e1veis \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 4.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 knowledge worker onboarding ROI study\\n  \\u2022 Building Second Brain GTD productivity peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 reusable workflow corporate training effectiveness\\n  \\u2022 playbook documentation team productivity meta-analysis\\nFalseamento alvo: onboarding estruturado n\\u00e3o correlaciona com\\nprodutividade duradoura ou produz fadiga de sistema.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C8 \\u2014 Repurpose cross-platform de conte\\u00fado \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 4.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 cross-media content repurposing strategy peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 content modularization multi-platform marketing\\n  \\u2022 one-source many-channel content reuse academic\\nFalseamento alvo: repurpose dilui qualidade percebida do canal\\nprim\\u00e1rio.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C9 \\u2014 Recorte brasileiro \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5. Queries em PT-BR.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 SBC ASAG prompt engineering portugu\\u00eas Brasil\\n  \\u2022 SciELO IA generativa letramento educa\\u00e7\\u00e3o Brasil\\n  \\u2022 IA generativa produtividade trabalho Brasil pesquisa acad\\u00eamica\\n  \\u2022 PL 2338 2023 intelig\\u00eancia artificial Brasil discuss\\u00e3o acad\\u00eamica\\n  \\u2022 USP FGV Insper IA generativa estudo emp\\u00edrico\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos brasileiros mostrando padr\\u00f5es diferentes\\ndo recorte global, ou inadequa\\u00e7\\u00e3o de frameworks anglo-sax\\u00f5es ao\\ncontexto BR.\\n\\n[CRIT\\u00c9RIO DE QUALIDADE DO TURNO]\\n- TOTAL alvo: 50-80 fontes.\\n- Cobertura: 9 clusters, nenhum vazio.\\n- Falseamento: cada cluster com m\\u00ednimo 1 fonte contr\\u00e1ria.\\n- Qualidade > quantidade.\\n- Idioma do output: PT-BR ou EN, consistente.\\n- Formato: array JSON \\u00fanico, um objeto por fonte, sem texto extra.\\n\\n[ENTREGA]\\nRetorne apenas o array JSON. Sem pr\\u00f3logo, sem ep\\u00edlogo, sem\\ncoment\\u00e1rios fora do schema.\\n\\n=========================================================\\nFIM DO CMD\\n=========================================================\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n**O que est\\u00e1 na planilha (14 abas)**\\n\\n```\\n00_LEIA_PRIMEIRO           \\u2192 cover, princ\\u00edpios, como usar\\n01_DECISOES                \\u2192 8 decis\\u00f5es resolvidas com justificativa\\n02_TESE_E_FORMULA          \\u2192 tese, f\\u00f3rmula, hip\\u00f3teses operacionais\\n03_PIPELINE                \\u2192 F0 \\u2192 F7 com status e sa\\u00edda concreta\\n04_PERGUNTAS               \\u2192 13 perguntas de pesquisa priorizadas\\n05_HIPOTESES_MATRIZ        \\u2192 7 hip\\u00f3teses mensur\\u00e1veis (H1-H5 + H6/H7 contra)\\n06_CLUSTERS_PESQUISA       \\u2192 9 clusters com queries e alvos de falseamento\\n07_LOG_FONTES              \\u2192 4 fontes seed + 80 linhas prontas, score auto\\n08_RUBRICA_SIMILARIDADE    \\u2192 5 dimens\\u00f5es, faixas de interpreta\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\n09_RISCOS                  \\u2192 21 riscos com mitiga\\u00e7\\u00e3o e m\\u00e9trica de prova\\n10_METRICAS                \\u2192 11 m\\u00e9tricas (incluindo f\\u00f3rmula Empower V4)\\n11_CLASSIF_EVIDENCIA       \\u2192 6 tipos + 5 pr\\u00e9-findings do scan interno\\n12_REPURPOSE_PIPELINE      \\u2192 6 canais, ordem de publica\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\n13_CMD_PRONTO              \\u2192 o CMD completo para copiar\\n```\\n\\nA aba **07_LOG_FONTES** tem 80 linhas vazias prontas para receber a sa\\u00edda do Wide Research, com f\\u00f3rmula de score ponderado autom\\u00e1tica. As 4 fontes seed do template original j\\u00e1 est\\u00e3o validadas e pontuadas (entre 75% e 79% \\u2014 todas na faixa \\\"muito pr\\u00f3ximo\\\").\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Pr\\u00f3xima decis\\u00e3o sua**\\n\\nAntes de disparar o Wide Research, tr\\u00eas coisas precisam de confirma\\u00e7\\u00e3o expl\\u00edcita: (1) voc\\u00ea aceita as 8 decis\\u00f5es da aba 01 como est\\u00e3o, ou quer reabrir alguma; (2) voc\\u00ea confirma o threshold de 40% e a faixa N=50-80; (3) voc\\u00ea compromete-se com o falseamento (uma fonte contra por cluster m\\u00ednimo). Se sim para os tr\\u00eas, dispara o CMD e me devolve o JSON.\", \"citations\": []}, {\"start_timestamp\": \"2026-05-16T09:59:56.207517Z\", \"stop_timestamp\": \"2026-05-16T09:59:56.631657Z\", Depois disso, trasnccrev aqui o cmd final para eu rodar CMD no Wide Research e dispara a fase F3. com sonet\", \"citations\": []}], \"sender\": \"human\", \"created_at\": \"2026-05-16T10:03:04.082821Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2026-05-16T10:03:04.082821Z\", \"attachments\": [], \"files\": [], \"parent_message_uuid\": \"019e303b-df83-7c37-8b43-3862cf6a7cb1\"}, {\"uuid\": \"019e303d-4875-7a6c-bea9-cd3a4030dc23\", \"text\": \" Confirmadas as 3 decis\\u00f5es cr\\u00edticas:\\n\\n\\u2713 **N = 60 fontes** (faixa operacional 50-80)  \\n\\u2713 **Opus aqui para decis\\u00e3o/s\\u00edntese, Wide Research (Sonnet) para coleta paralela**  \\n\\u2713 **Falseamento comprometido** \\u2014 m\\u00ednimo 1 fonte contr\\u00e1ria por cluster\\n\\n---\\n\\n**CMD FINAL \\u2014 COPIE E COLE NO WIDE RESEARCH**\\n\\n```\\n=========================================================\\nCMD PARA WIDE RESEARCH MODE \\u2014 TESE ESTRUTURA DE CONTA IA\\nVers\\u00e3o 1.0 \\u00b7 Maio 2026\\n=========================================================\\n\\n[PAPEL]\\nVoc\\u00ea \\u00e9 um analista de pesquisa s\\u00eanior, auditor metodol\\u00f3gico e agente de s\\u00edntese de evid\\u00eancias. Sua miss\\u00e3o N\\u00c3O \\u00e9 validar a tese do autor \\u2014 \\u00e9 investigar, pressionar, testar, refinar e desafiar com rigor metodol\\u00f3gico, racioc\\u00ednio causal e separa\\u00e7\\u00e3o rigorosa entre evid\\u00eancia, infer\\u00eancia, hip\\u00f3tese e opini\\u00e3o. Trate fontes confirmat\\u00f3rias com escrut\\u00ednio NORMAL e fontes contr\\u00e1rias com escrut\\u00ednio mais LENIENTE (assimetria intencional para combater vi\\u00e9s de confirma\\u00e7\\u00e3o).\\n\\n[TESE A INVESTIGAR]\\n\\\"Contas de IA profissionalmente estruturadas \\u2014 combinando letramento em IA, personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o persistente, skills reutiliz\\u00e1veis (SKILL.md), frameworks determin\\u00edsticos e conectores (MCP) \\u2014 produzem maior efici\\u00eancia operacional e menor retrabalho do que contas n\\u00e3o estruturadas.\\\"\\n\\nF\\u00f3rmula: L + P + S + FD + C  \\u2192  \\u2191 produtividade,  \\u2193 retrabalho\\n\\nOnde:\\n- L  = letramento em IA\\n- P  = personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o da conta\\n- S  = Skills / SKILL.md\\n- FD = frameworks determin\\u00edsticos\\n- C  = conectores (MCP)\\n\\n[MISS\\u00c3O]\\nInvestigar 9 clusters de pesquisa, retornando entre 5 e 10 fontes por cluster (meta total: 50-80 fontes). Para cada fonte, preencher TODOS os campos do schema abaixo. N\\u00e3o inventar. N\\u00e3o preencher campos sem evid\\u00eancia verific\\u00e1vel.\\n\\n[OUTPUT SCHEMA \\u2014 UM OBJETO JSON POR FONTE]\\n{\\n  \\\"cluster_id\\\": \\\"C1\\\",\\n  \\\"source_id\\\": \\\"S005\\\",\\n  \\\"title\\\": \\\"...\\\",\\n  \\\"authors_or_org\\\": \\\"...\\\",\\n  \\\"year\\\": 2025,\\n  \\\"region\\\": \\\"US|Global|EU|Brasil|Outro\\\",\\n  \\\"source_type\\\": \\\"peer-reviewed paper | preprint | official docs | repo | industry report | book | thesis\\\",\\n  \\\"url\\\": \\\"https://...\\\",\\n  \\\"methodology\\\": \\\"1-2 frases descrevendo design do estudo\\\",\\n  \\\"sample_or_dataset\\\": \\\"n=... ou descri\\u00e7\\u00e3o\\\",\\n  \\\"main_claim\\\": \\\"1-2 frases\\\",\\n  \\\"relevance_to_thesis\\\": \\\"1-2 frases ligando \\u00e0 f\\u00f3rmula L+P+S+FD+C\\\",\\n  \\\"similarity_topic_0_5\\\": 4,\\n  \\\"similarity_method_0_5\\\": 3,\\n  \\\"similarity_tooling_0_5\\\": 4,\\n  \\\"similarity_outcome_0_5\\\": 3,\\n  \\\"similarity_context_0_5\\\": 2,\\n  \\\"evidence_type\\\": \\\"direct | inferred | hypothesis | opinion | contextual\\\",\\n  \\\"contradicts_thesis\\\": false,\\n  \\\"limitations\\\": \\\"1-2 frases\\\",\\n  \\\"confidence_0_5\\\": 4,\\n  \\\"notes\\\": \\\"opcional\\\"\\n}\\n\\n[REGRAS]\\n1. N\\u00c3O INVENTAR. Sem URL verific\\u00e1vel, n\\u00e3o retornar.\\n2. CADA CLUSTER exige no m\\u00ednimo 1 fonte com contradicts_thesis=true ou evid\\u00eancia emp\\u00edrica enfraquecendo a tese.\\n3. PRIORIDADE: peer-reviewed > documenta\\u00e7\\u00e3o oficial > reposit\\u00f3rio > relat\\u00f3rio industrial > artigo t\\u00e9cnico cred\\u00edvel.\\n4. Sub-scores 0-5 em cada uma das 5 dimens\\u00f5es de similaridade; o score ponderado \\u00e9 calculado pelo autor (topic 30% + method 20% + tooling 20% + outcome 15% + context 15%).\\n5. INCLUS\\u00c3O M\\u00cdNIMA: score ponderado estimado \\u2265 40%. Se abaixo, marcar evidence_type=\\\"contextual\\\".\\n6. PARA C9 (Brasil): priorizar SBC, SciELO, USP, FGV, Insper, Unicamp, UFRJ, UFMG, CAPES.\\n7. Se duas fontes dizem o mesmo, manter apenas a prim\\u00e1ria.\\n8. Preferir par\\u00e1frase a cita\\u00e7\\u00e3o direta.\\n\\n[OS 9 CLUSTERS]\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C1 \\u2014 Letramento em IA + Prompt Engineering (n\\u00facleo) \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7. Inclui Knoth et al. 2024 (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI literacy prompt engineering\\\" review 2024 2025\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI fluency\\\" framework empirical study Anthropic\\n  \\u2022 prompt structure productivity LLM peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 prompt quality user expertise correlation\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando que prompting estruturado N\\u00c3O melhora output ou tem efeito nulo / inconsistente.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C2 \\u2014 Personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o e contexto persistente \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 6.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 LLM personalization system prompts performance\\n  \\u2022 custom instructions ChatGPT Claude benchmark\\n  \\u2022 persistent context user productivity LLM\\n  \\u2022 memory augmented LLM task completion study\\nFalseamento alvo: regress\\u00e3o de personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o em tarefas fora da distribui\\u00e7\\u00e3o ou degrada\\u00e7\\u00e3o por overfitting de contexto.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C3 \\u2014 Skills reutiliz\\u00e1veis / SKILL.md / agentes modulares \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7. Inclui Anthropic docs (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic Claude Skills SKILL.md documentation\\n  \\u2022 reusable prompt templates modular LLM workflow\\n  \\u2022 LangGraph AutoGen CrewAI productivity comparison\\n  \\u2022 function calling tool use reusable patterns enterprise\\nFalseamento alvo: reprodutibilidade fraca ou inconsist\\u00eancia entre execu\\u00e7\\u00f5es de workflows baseados em skills.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C4 \\u2014 Frameworks determin\\u00edsticos / workflows com gates \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 deterministic LLM workflow DSPy LangChain benchmark\\n  \\u2022 constrained decoding output quality study\\n  \\u2022 gate-based pipeline LLM consistency\\n  \\u2022 structured workflow vs free-form prompting outcome\\nFalseamento alvo: workflows determin\\u00edsticos perdem performance em tarefas abertas, criativas ou explorat\\u00f3rias.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C5 \\u2014 Conectores / MCP / tool use \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5. Inclui MCP docs (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Model Context Protocol MCP adoption study\\n  \\u2022 tool use LLM error rate latency benchmark\\n  \\u2022 function calling productivity benchmark enterprise\\n  \\u2022 external tool integration LLM workflow efficiency\\nFalseamento alvo: custo de fric\\u00e7\\u00e3o, lat\\u00eancia ou erro de MCP supera o ganho de produtividade.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C6 \\u2014 Efici\\u00eancia operacional + redu\\u00e7\\u00e3o de retrabalho \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 CR\\u00cdTICO\\nMin: 10. Este \\u00e9 o elo MAIS FRACO da tese.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Workday Hanover Research AI rework 40% time saved\\n  \\u2022 KPMG University of Melbourne AI work errors 48340 study\\n  \\u2022 Microsoft Work Trend Index 2024 2025 2026\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic AI Fluency Index 9830 conversations iteration\\n  \\u2022 generative AI productivity rework reduction peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 LLM output quality verification rework cost\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando IA aumenta retrabalho total, gera falsa produtividade, ou onde tempo economizado \\u00e9 compensado por corre\\u00e7\\u00e3o. ATEN\\u00c7\\u00c3O: distinguir estat\\u00edsticas sobre o PROBLEMA (uso desestruturado) de estat\\u00edsticas sobre o EFEITO da interven\\u00e7\\u00e3o (uso estruturado).\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C7 \\u2014 Onboarding e workflows reutiliz\\u00e1veis \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 4.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 knowledge worker onboarding ROI study\\n  \\u2022 Building Second Brain GTD productivity peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 reusable workflow corporate training effectiveness\\n  \\u2022 playbook documentation team productivity meta-analysis\\nFalseamento alvo: onboarding estruturado n\\u00e3o correlaciona com produtividade duradoura ou produz fadiga de sistema.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C8 \\u2014 Repurpose cross-platform de conte\\u00fado \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 4.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 cross-media content repurposing strategy peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 content modularization multi-platform marketing\\n  \\u2022 one-source many-channel content reuse academic\\nFalseamento alvo: repurpose dilui qualidade percebida do canal prim\\u00e1rio.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C9 \\u2014 Recorte brasileiro \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5. Queries em PT-BR.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 SBC ASAG prompt engineering portugu\\u00eas Brasil\\n  \\u2022 SciELO IA generativa letramento educa\\u00e7\\u00e3o Brasil\\n  \\u2022 IA generativa produtividade trabalho Brasil pesquisa acad\\u00eamica\\n  \\u2022 PL 2338 2023 intelig\\u00eancia artificial Brasil discuss\\u00e3o acad\\u00eamica\\n  \\u2022 USP FGV Insper IA generativa estudo emp\\u00edrico\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos brasileiros mostrando padr\\u00f5es diferentes do recorte global, ou inadequa\\u00e7\\u00e3o de frameworks anglo-sax\\u00f5es ao contexto BR.\\n\\n[CRIT\\u00c9RIO DE QUALIDADE DO TURNO]\\n- TOTAL alvo: 50-80 fontes.\\n- Cobertura: 9 clusters, nenhum vazio.\\n- Falseamento: cada cluster com m\\u00ednimo 1 fonte contr\\u00e1ria.\\n- Qualidade > quantidade.\\n- Idioma do output: PT-BR ou EN, consistente.\\n- Formato: array JSON \\u00fanico, um objeto por fonte, sem texto extra.\\n\\n[ENTREGA]\\nRetorne apenas o array JSON. Sem pr\\u00f3logo, sem ep\\u00edlogo, sem coment\\u00e1rios fora do schema. O autor importar\\u00e1 para uma planilha estruturada.\\n\\n=========================================================\\nFIM DO CMD\\n=========================================================\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Instru\\u00e7\\u00e3o de execu\\u00e7\\u00e3o:**\\n\\n1. Copie TODO o bloco acima (desde \\\"==========\\\" at\\u00e9 \\\"=========\\\")\\n2. Abra claude.ai em modo **Wide Research** (n\\u00e3o modo normal)\\n3. Cole o CMD inteiro\\n4. Dispare\\n5. Quando voltar o JSON completo, copie e **volte aqui neste chat** com ele\\n\\nQuando voc\\u00ea colar o JSON de retorno aqui, eu rodo a **Fase F4** (popular a planilha) + **Fase F5** (s\\u00edntese auditorial com as 12 se\\u00e7\\u00f5es do task prompt original).\\n\\n**Fase F3 disparada \\u2014 aguardo o JSON.**\", \"content\": [{\"start_timestamp\": \"2026-05-16T10:03:06.130253Z\", \"stop_timestamp\": \"2026-05-16T10:04:15.290860Z\", \"flags\": null, \"type\": \"text\", \"text\": \" Confirmadas as 3 decis\\u00f5es cr\\u00edticas:\\n\\n\\u2713 **N = 60 fontes** (faixa operacional 50-80)  \\n\\u2713 **Opus aqui para decis\\u00e3o/s\\u00edntese, Wide Research (Sonnet) para coleta paralela**  \\n\\u2713 **Falseamento comprometido** \\u2014 m\\u00ednimo 1 fonte contr\\u00e1ria por cluster\\n\\n---\\n\\n**CMD FINAL \\u2014 COPIE E COLE NO WIDE RESEARCH**\\n\\n```\\n=========================================================\\nCMD PARA WIDE RESEARCH MODE \\u2014 TESE ESTRUTURA DE CONTA IA\\nVers\\u00e3o 1.0 \\u00b7 Maio 2026\\n=========================================================\\n\\n[PAPEL]\\nVoc\\u00ea \\u00e9 um analista de pesquisa s\\u00eanior, auditor metodol\\u00f3gico e agente de s\\u00edntese de evid\\u00eancias. Inclui Knoth et al. 2024 (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI literacy prompt engineering\\\" review 2024 2025\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI fluency\\\" framework empirical study Anthropic\\n  \\u2022 prompt structure productivity LLM peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 prompt quality user expertise correlation\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando que prompting estruturado N\\u00c3O melhora output ou tem efeito nulo / inconsistente.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C2 \\u2014 Personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o e contexto persistente \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 6.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 LLM personalization system prompts performance\\n  \\u2022 custom instructions ChatGPT Claude benchmark\\n  \\u2022 persistent context user productivity LLM\\n  \\u2022 memory augmented LLM task completion study\\nFalseamento alvo: regress\\u00e3o de personaliza\\u00e7\\u00e3o em tarefas fora da distribui\\u00e7\\u00e3o ou degrada\\u00e7\\u00e3o por overfitting de contexto.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C3 \\u2014 Skills reutiliz\\u00e1veis / SKILL.md / agentes modulares \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7. Inclui Anthropic docs (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic Claude Skills SKILL.md documentation\\n  \\u2022 reusable prompt templates modular LLM workflow\\n  \\u2022 LangGraph AutoGen CrewAI productivity comparison\\n  \\u2022 function calling tool use reusable patterns enterprise\\nFalseamento alvo: reprodutibilidade fraca ou inconsist\\u00eancia entre execu\\u00e7\\u00f5es de workflows baseados em skills.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C4 \\u2014 Frameworks determin\\u00edsticos / workflows com gates \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 deterministic LLM workflow DSPy LangChain benchmark\\n  \\u2022 constrained decoding output quality study\\n  \\u2022 gate-based pipeline LLM consistency\\n  \\u2022 structured workflow vs free-form prompting outcome\\nFalseamento alvo: workflows determin\\u00edsticos perdem performance em tarefas abertas, criativas ou explorat\\u00f3rias.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C5 \\u2014 Conectores / MCP / tool use \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5. Inclui MCP docs (j\\u00e1 validado).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Model Context Protocol MCP adoption study\\n  \\u2022 tool use LLM error rate latency benchmark\\n  \\u2022 function calling productivity benchmark enterprise\\n  \\u2022 external tool integration LLM workflow efficiency\\nFalseamento alvo: custo de fric\\u00e7\\u00e3o, lat\\u00eancia ou erro de MCP supera o ganho de produtividade.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C6 \\u2014 Efici\\u00eancia operacional + redu\\u00e7\\u00e3o de retrabalho \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 CR\\u00cdTICO\\nMin: 10. Este \\u00e9 o elo MAIS FRACO da tese.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Workday Hanover Research AI rework 40% time saved\\n  \\u2022 KPMG University of Melbourne AI work errors 48340 study\\n  \\u2022 Microsoft Work Trend Index 2024 2025 2026\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic AI Fluency Index 9830 conversations iteration\\n  \\u2022 generative AI productivity rework reduction peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 LLM output quality verification rework cost\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos mostrando IA aumenta retrabalho total, gera falsa produtividade, ou onde tempo economizado \\u00e9 compensado por corre\\u00e7\\u00e3o. ATEN\\u00c7\\u00c3O: distinguir estat\\u00edsticas sobre o PROBLEMA (uso desestruturado) de estat\\u00edsticas sobre o EFEITO da interven\\u00e7\\u00e3o (uso estruturado).\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C7 \\u2014 Onboarding e workflows reutiliz\\u00e1veis \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 4.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 knowledge worker onboarding ROI study\\n  \\u2022 Building Second Brain GTD productivity peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 reusable workflow corporate training effectiveness\\n  \\u2022 playbook documentation team productivity meta-analysis\\nFalseamento alvo: onboarding estruturado n\\u00e3o correlaciona com produtividade duradoura ou produz fadiga de sistema.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C8 \\u2014 Repurpose cross-platform de conte\\u00fado \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 4.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 cross-media content repurposing strategy peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 content modularization multi-platform marketing\\n  \\u2022 one-source many-channel content reuse academic\\nFalseamento alvo: repurpose dilui qualidade percebida do canal prim\\u00e1rio.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C9 \\u2014 Recorte brasileiro \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5. Queries em PT-BR.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 SBC ASAG prompt engineering portugu\\u00eas Brasil\\n  \\u2022 SciELO IA generativa letramento educa\\u00e7\\u00e3o Brasil\\n  \\u2022 IA generativa produtividade trabalho Brasil pesquisa acad\\u00eamica\\n  \\u2022 PL 2338 2023 intelig\\u00eancia artificial Brasil discuss\\u00e3o acad\\u00eamica\\n  \\u2022 USP FGV Insper IA generativa estudo emp\\u00edrico\\nFalseamento alvo: estudos brasileiros mostrando padr\\u00f5es diferentes do recorte global, ou inadequa\\u00e7\\u00e3o de frameworks anglo-sax\\u00f5es ao contexto BR.\\n\\n[CRIT\\u00c9RIO DE QUALIDADE DO TURNO]\\n- TOTAL alvo: 50-80 fontes.\\n- Cobertura: 9 clusters, nenhum vazio.\\n- Falseamento: cada cluster com m\\u00ednimo 1 fonte contr\\u00e1ria.\\n- Qualidade > quantidade.\\n- Idioma do output: PT-BR ou EN, consistente.\\n- Formato: array JSON \\u00fanico, um objeto por fonte, sem texto extra.\\n\\n[ENTREGA]\\nRetorne apenas o array JSON. Your mission is NOT to automatically validate the author's thesis. Apply NORMAL scrutiny to confirmatory sources and MORE LENIENT scrutiny to contradictory sources (intentional asymmetry to combat confirmation bias).\\n\\n[THESIS TO INVESTIGATE]\\n\\\"Professionally structured AI accounts \\u2014 combining AI literacy, persistent personalization, reusable skills (SKILL.md), deterministic frameworks, and connectors (MCP) \\u2014 produce higher operational efficiency and lower rework than unstructured accounts.\\\"\\n\\nFormula: L + P + S + FD + C  \\u2192  \\u2191 productivity,  \\u2193 rework\\n\\nWhere:\\n- L  = AI literacy\\n- P  = account personalization\\n- S  = Skills / SKILL.md\\n- FD = deterministic frameworks\\n- C  = connectors (MCP)\\n\\n[MISSION]\\nInvestigate 9 research clusters, returning 5-10 sources per cluster (target total: 50-80 sources). For each source, fill ALL fields in the schema below. Do not invent. DO NOT INVENT. Without verifiable URL, do not return.\\n2. EACH CLUSTER requires minimum 1 source with contradiz_tese=true OR empirical evidence weakening the thesis.\\n3. PRIORITY: peer-reviewed > official documentation > repository > industry report > credible technical article.\\n4. MINIMUM INCLUSION: estimated weighted score \\u2265 40%. If below, mark tipo_evidencia=\\\"contextual\\\".\\n6. FOR C9 (Brazil): prioritize SBC, SciELO, USP, FGV, Insper, Unicamp, UFRJ, UFMG, CAPES.\\n7. If two sources say the same thing, keep only the primary.\\n8. Prefer paraphrase to direct quotation.\\n\\n[THE 9 CLUSTERS]\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C1 \\u2014 AI Literacy + Prompt Engineering (core) \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7 sources. Includes Knoth et al. 2024 (already validated).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI literacy prompt engineering\\\" review 2024 2025\\n  \\u2022 \\\"AI fluency\\\" framework empirical study Anthropic\\n  \\u2022 prompt structure productivity LLM peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 prompt quality user expertise correlation\\nFalsification target: studies showing structured prompting does NOT improve output or has null/inconsistent effect.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C2 \\u2014 Personalization and persistent context \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 6 sources.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 LLM personalization system prompts performance\\n  \\u2022 custom instructions ChatGPT Claude benchmark\\n  \\u2022 persistent context user productivity LLM\\n  \\u2022 memory augmented LLM task completion study\\nFalsification target: personalization regression on out-of-distribution tasks or degradation from context overfitting.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C3 \\u2014 Reusable skills / SKILL.md / modular agents \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 7 sources. Includes Anthropic docs (already validated).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic Claude Skills SKILL.md documentation\\n  \\u2022 reusable prompt templates modular LLM workflow\\n  \\u2022 LangGraph AutoGen CrewAI productivity comparison\\n  \\u2022 function calling tool use reusable patterns enterprise\\nFalsification target: weak reproducibility or inconsistency across executions of skill-based workflows.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C4 \\u2014 Deterministic frameworks / workflows with gates \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5 sources.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 deterministic LLM workflow DSPy LangChain benchmark\\n  \\u2022 constrained decoding output quality study\\n  \\u2022 gate-based pipeline LLM consistency\\n  \\u2022 structured workflow vs free-form prompting outcome\\nFalsification target: deterministic workflows lose performance on open, creative, or exploratory tasks.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C5 \\u2014 Connectors / MCP / tool use \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550\\nMin: 5 sources. Includes MCP docs (already validated).\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Model Context Protocol MCP adoption study\\n  \\u2022 tool use LLM error rate latency benchmark\\n  \\u2022 function calling productivity benchmark enterprise\\n  \\u2022 external tool integration LLM workflow efficiency\\nFalsification target: friction cost, latency, or error rate of MCP exceeds productivity gain.\\n\\n\\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 C6 \\u2014 Operational efficiency + rework reduction \\u2550\\u2550\\u2550 CRITICAL\\nMin: 10 sources. This is the WEAKEST link in the thesis.\\nQueries:\\n  \\u2022 Workday Hanover Research AI rework 40% time saved\\n  \\u2022 KPMG University of Melbourne AI work errors 48340 study\\n  \\u2022 Microsoft Work Trend Index 2024 2025 2026\\n  \\u2022 Anthropic AI Fluency Index 9830 conversations iteration\\n  \\u2022 generative AI productivity rework reduction peer-reviewed\\n  \\u2022 LLM output quality verification rework cost\\nFalsification target: studies showing AI increases total rework, generates false productivity, or where time saved is offset by correction.
