\"#!/usr/bin/env python3\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\nclaude_export_benchmark.py\\n\\nNormalize Claude.ai exports, tag workflow/CMD/Skill usage, compute productivity metrics,\\nand generate a master index for comparing multiple Claude accounts or export batches.\\n\\nNo API key required. Standard library only.\\n\\nUsage:\\n  python claude_export_benchmark.py --input batch-0000.zip --account conta_a --out out/conta_a\\n  python claude_export_benchmark.py --input exports/*.zip --account conta_a --out out/conta_a --emit-sql\\n  python claude_export_benchmark.py --compare out/conta_a/account_summary.json out/conta_b/account_summary.json --out out/compare\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\n\\nimport argparse\\nimport csv\\nimport glob\\nimport hashlib\\nimport json\\nimport math\\nimport os\\nimport re\\nimport statistics\\nimport tempfile\\nimport zipfile\\nfrom collections import Counter, defaultdict\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, asdict\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Iterable, List, Optional, Tuple\\n\\n# -----------------------------\\n# Configuration\\n# -----------------------------\\n\\nKEYWORD_TAGS = {\\n    \\\"cmd\\\": [r\\\"\\\\bcmd\\\\b\\\", r\\\"slash command\\\", r\\\"/skill\\\", r\\\"/project\\\", r\\\"/claude\\\", r\\\"command\\\", r\\\"comando\\\"],\\n    \\\"workflow\\\": [r\\\"workflow\\\", r\\\"fluxo\\\", r\\\"pipeline\\\", r\\\"processo\\\", r\\\"rotina\\\", r\\\"operacional\\\"],\\n    \\\"custom-instruction\\\": [r\\\"custom instruction\\\", r\\\"instru[c\\u00e7][a\\u00e3]o\\\", r\\\"system prompt\\\", r\\\"operating instruction\\\", r\\\"instrucoes\\\", r\\\"instru\\u00e7\\u00f5es\\\"],\\n    \\\"skill-md\\\": [r\\\"skill\\\\.md\\\", r\\\"skill md\\\", r\\\"SKILL\\\\.md\\\", r\\\"skill creator\\\", r\\\"skill-creator\\\", r\\\"anthropic skill\\\"],\\n    \\\"supabase\\\": [r\\\"supabase\\\", r\\\"postgres\\\", r\\\"sql\\\", r\\\"database\\\", r\\\"banco de dados\\\"],\\n    \\\"ai-governance\\\": [r\\\"governance\\\", r\\\"governan[c\\u00e7]a\\\", r\\\"ai act\\\", r\\\"article 4\\\", r\\\"literacy\\\", r\\\"compliance\\\"],\\n    \\\"content-system\\\": [r\\\"ebook\\\", r\\\"editorial\\\", r\\\"conte[u\\u00fa]do\\\", r\\\"linkedin\\\", r\\\"seo\\\", r\\\"post\\\", r\\\"article\\\"],\\n    \\\"design-system\\\": [r\\\"design\\\", r\\\"tokens\\\", r\\\"canva\\\", r\\\"figma\\\", r\\\"visual\\\", r\\\"markdown\\\", r\\\"notion\\\"],\\n    \\\"data-analysis\\\": [r\\\"csv\\\", r\\\"json\\\", r\\\"xlsx\\\", r\\\"planilha\\\", r\\\"metric\\\", r\\\"m[e\\u00e9]trica\\\", r\\\"analytics\\\", r\\\"benchmark\\\"],\\n    \\\"code-dev\\\": [r\\\"python\\\", r\\\"script\\\", r\\\"github\\\", r\\\"repo\\\", r\\\"readme\\\", r\\\"yaml\\\", r\\\"mermaid\\\", r\\\"react\\\", r\\\"api\\\"],\\n}\\n\\nOUTPUT_MARKERS = [\\n    r\\\"crie\\\", r\\\"create\\\", r\\\"generate\\\", r\\\"gerar\\\", r\\\"entreg\\\", r\\\"deliver\\\", r\\\"arquivo\\\", r\\\"file\\\",\\n    r\\\"readme\\\", r\\\"md\\\", r\\\"sql\\\", r\\\"py\\\", r\\\"csv\\\", r\\\"json\\\", r\\\"yaml\\\", r\\\"zip\\\", r\\\"deck\\\", r\\\"pdf\\\",\\n]\\n\\nDISCERNMENT_MARKERS = [\\n    r\\\"audit\\\", r\\\"compare\\\", r\\\"compar\\\", r\\\"critique\\\", r\\\"cr[i\\u00ed]tic\\\", r\\\"risk\\\", r\\\"risco\\\", r\\\"valida\\\", r\\\"evid[e\\u00ea]ncia\\\", r\\\"compliance\\\", r\\\"security\\\", r\\\"privacy\\\", r\\\"governance\\\", r\\\"legal\\\", r\\\"license\\\", r\\\"mit\\\",\\n]\\n\\nDESCRIPTION_MARKERS = [\\n    r\\\"format\\\", r\\\"schema\\\", r\\\"estrutura\\\", r\\\"tabela\\\", r\\\"yaml\\\", r\\\"json\\\", r\\\"markdown\\\", r\\\"criteria\\\", r\\\"crit[e\\u00e9]rio\\\", r\\\"tone\\\", r\\\"tom\\\", r\\\"style\\\", r\\\"estilo\\\",\\n]\\n\\nDELEGATION_MARKERS = [\\n    r\\\"fa[c\\u00e7]a\\\", r\\\"create\\\", r\\\"crie\\\", r\\\"gere\\\", r\\\"build\\\", r\\\"transform\\\", r\\\"converta\\\", r\\\"rode\\\", r\\\"run\\\", r\\\"execute\\\", r\\\"analyze\\\", r\\\"analise\\\",\\n]\\n\\nDOC_MARKERS = [\\n    r\\\"```\\\", r\\\"^#\\\\s\\\", r\\\"^##\\\\s\\\", r\\\"\\\\|.+\\\\|\\\", r\\\"\\\\{\\\\s*\\\\\\\"\\\", r\\\"^---$\\\", r\\\"^\\\\w+:\\\\s*\\\", r\\\"mermaid\\\", r\\\"yaml\\\", r\\\"json\\\", r\\\"csv\\\", r\\\"markdown\\\",\\n]\\n\\nSLASH_RE = -----------------------------\\n\\n@dataclass\\nclass MessageRow:\\n    account: str\\n    conversation_id: str\\n    conversation_title: str\\n    conversation_created_at: str\\n    message_id: int\\n    text_message_count: int\\n    user_message_count: int\\n    assistant_message_count: int\\n    total_chars: int\\n    user_chars: int\\n    assistant_chars: int\\n    avg_user_prompt_chars: float\\n    diligence_score: float\\n    four_d_score: float\\n    productivity_score: float\\n    context_waste_score: float\\n\\n# -----------------------------\\n# Generic helpers\\n# -----------------------------\\n\\ndef safe_mkdir(path: Path) -> None:\\n    path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\n\\n\\ndef parse_dt(value: Any) -> str:\\n    if not value:\\n        return \\\"\\\"\\n    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):\\n        try:\\n            # Claude exports may use milliseconds or seconds.\\n            ts = value / 1000 if value > 10_000_000_000 else value\\n            return datetime.fromtimestamp(ts, tz=timezone.utc).isoformat()\\n        except Exception:\\n            return str(value)\\n    if isinstance(value, str):\\n        s = value.strip()\\n        # Normalize common Z suffix.\\n        if s.endswith(\\\"Z\\\"):\\n            s = s[:-1] + \\\"+00:00\\\"\\n        try:\\n            return datetime.fromisoformat(s).isoformat()\\n        except Exception:\\n            return value\\n    return str(value)\\n\\n\\ndef sha_id(*parts: str, n: int = 16) -> str:\\n    h = hashlib.sha256(\\\"\\\\n\\\".join(parts).encode(\\\"utf-8\\\", errors=\\\"ignore\\\")).hexdigest()\\n    return h[:n]\\n\\n\\ndef compact_spaces(text: str) -> str:\\n    return re.sub(r\\\"\\\\s+\\\", \\\" \\\", text or \\\"\\\").strip()\\n\\n\\ndef word_count(text: str) -> int:\\n    return len(WORD_RE.findall(text or \\\"\\\"))\\n\\n\\ndef pct(n: float, d: float) -> float:\\n    return 0.0 if not d else round(100.0 * n / d, 2)\\n\\n\\ndef clamp(x: float, lo: float = 0.0, hi: float = 100.0) -> float:\\n    return max(lo, min(hi, x))\\n\\n\\n< truncated lines 186-725 >\\n    (out_dir / \\\"supabase_schema.sql\\\").write_text(schema + \\\"\\\\n\\\", encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n\\n    conv_cols = [\\n        \\\"account\\\", \\\"conversation_id\\\", \\\"title\\\", \\\"created_at\\\", \\\"updated_at\\\", \\\"tags\\\", \\\"message_count\\\",\\n        \\\"text_message_count\\\", \\\"user_message_count\\\", \\\"assistant_message_count\\\", \\\"total_chars\\\", \\\"user_chars\\\",\\n        \\\"assistant_chars\\\", \\\"avg_user_prompt_chars\\\", \\\"response_to_prompt_ratio\\\", \\\"named\\\", \\\"title_quality_score\\\",\\n        \\\"doc_heavy\\\", \\\"document_ratio_score\\\", \\\"deliverable_intent\\\", \\\"repeated_prompt_count\\\", \\\"slash_command_count\\\",\\n        \\\"unique_slash_commands\\\", \\\"delegation_score\\\", \\\"description_score\\\", \\\"discernment_score\\\", \\\"diligence_score\\\",\\n        \\\"four_d_score\\\", \\\"productivity_score\\\", \\\"context_waste_score\\\", \\\"source_files\\\",\\n    ]\\n    msg_cols = [\\n        \\\"account\\\", \\\"conversation_id\\\", \\\"message_id\\\", \\\"role\\\", \\\"created_at\\\", \\\"char_count\\\", \\\"word_count\\\",\\n        \\\"has_text\\\", \\\"slash_commands\\\", \\\"tags\\\", \\\"text\\\", \\\"source_file\\\",\\n    ]\\n    lines = [\\\"-- Data upsert generated by claude_export_benchmark.py\\\"]\\n    for m in metrics:\\n        d = asdict(m)\\n        values = \\\", \\\".join(sql_quote(d[c]) for c in conv_cols)\\n        updates = \\\", \\\".join(f\\\"{c}=excluded.{c}\\\" for c in conv_cols if c not in [\\\"account\\\", \\\"conversation_id\\\"])\\n        lines.append(f\\\"insert into claude_conversations ({', '.join(conv_cols)}) values ({values}) on conflict (account, conversation_id) do update set {updates};\\\")\\n    for msg in messages:\\n        d = asdict(msg)\\n        values = \\\", \\\".join(sql_quote(d[c]) for c in msg_cols)\\n        updates = \\\", \\\".join(f\\\"{c}=excluded.{c}\\\" for c in msg_cols if c not in [\\\"account\\\", \\\"message_id\\\"])\\n        lines.append(f\\\"insert into claude_messages ({', '.join(msg_cols)}) values ({values}) on conflict (account, message_id) do update set {updates};\\\")\\n    (out_dir / \\\"supabase_upsert.sql\\\").write_text(\\\"\\\\n\\\".join(lines) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef write_master_index(out_dir: Path, summary: Dict[str, Any], metrics: List[ConversationMetric]) -> None:\\n    top = sorted(metrics, key=lambda m: m.productivity_score, reverse=True)[:30]\\n    waste = sorted(metrics, key=lambda m: m.context_waste_score, reverse=True)[:30]\\n    tags = summary.get(\\\"top_tags\\\", [])\\n    slashes = summary.get(\\\"top_slash_commands\\\", [])\\n\\n    def row(m: ConversationMetric) -> str:\\n        title = m.title.replace(\\\"|\\\", \\\" \\\")[:80]\\n        return f\\\"| {m.conversation_id[:8]} | {title} | {m.productivity_score} | {m.four_d_score} | {m.document_ratio_score} | {m.context_waste_score} | {m.tags} |\\\"\\n\\n    md = []\\n    md.append(f\\\"# Claude Export Productivity Master Index \\u2014 {summary.get('account')}\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"## Executive Summary\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"| Metric | Value |\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"|---|---:|\\\")\\n    for k in [\\n        \\\"conversation_count\\\", \\\"message_count\\\", \\\"text_message_count\\\", \\\"text_coverage_pct\\\",\\n        \\\"named_conversation_pct\\\", \\\"document_heavy_conversation_pct\\\", \\\"deliverable_intent_pct\\\",\\n        \\\"avg_user_prompt_chars\\\", \\\"slash_commands_per_100_conversations\\\", \\\"avg_four_d_score\\\",\\n        \\\"avg_productivity_score\\\", \\\"avg_context_waste_score\\\", \\\"conversations_per_active_day\\\",\\n        \\\"peak_day_conversations\\\",\\n    ]:\\n        md.append(f\\\"| {k} | {summary.get(k, '')} |\\\")\\n\\n    md.append(\\\"\\\\n## 4D Anthropic-Aligned Operational Lens\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"| D | Operational proxy in this report | Account average |\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"|---|---|---:|\\\")\\n    md.append(f\\\"| Delegation | Clear task handoff, automation, deliverable requests | {summary.get('avg_delegation_score')} |\\\")\\n    md.append(f\\\"| Description | Constraints, schemas, formats, examples, context | {summary.get('avg_description_score')} |\\\")\\n    md.append(f\\\"| Discernment | Audit, compare, validate, review, iterate | {summary.get('avg_discernment_score')} |\\\")\\n    md.append(f\\\"| Diligence | Evidence, risk, governance, legal/privacy/license care | {summary.get('avg_diligence_score')} |\\\")\\n\\n    md.append(\\\"\\\\n## Top Tags\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"| Tag | Conversations |\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"|---|---:|\\\")\\n    for tag, count in tags:\\n        md.append(f\\\"| {tag} | {count} |\\\")\\n\\n    md.append(\\\"\\\\n## Top Slash Commands\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"| Command | Uses |\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"|---|---:|\\\")\\n    for cmd, count in slashes[:20]:\\n        md.append(f\\\"| `{cmd}` | {count} |\\\")\\n\\n    md.append(\\\"\\\\n## Highest Productivity Conversations\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"| ID | Title | Productivity | 4D | Doc Ratio | Waste | Tags |\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|\\\")\\n    for m in top:\\n        md.append(row(m))\\n\\n    md.append(\\\"\\\\n## Highest Context Waste Conversations\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"| ID | Title | Productivity | 4D | Doc Ratio | Waste | Tags |\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|\\\")\\n    for m in waste:\\n        md.append(row(m))\\n\\n    md.append(\\\"\\\\n## Interpretation Rules\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"- High productivity + high 4D = strong strategic Claude usage.\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"- High document ratio = conversation is being used as a document/workbench, not only chat.\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"- High slash-command density = mature reusable workflow layer, unless commands are duplicated or inconsistent.\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"- High context waste = unnamed conversations, empty export text, repeated prompts, or weak retrievability.\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"- Low text coverage usually means incomplete export batches or metadata-only records.\\\")\\n\\n    (out_dir / \\\"productivity_master_index.md\\\").write_text(\\\"\\\\n\\\".join(md) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef write_run_outputs(out_dir: Path, metrics: List[ConversationMetric], messages: List[MessageRow], summary: Dict[str, Any], emit_sql: bool) -> None:\\n    safe_mkdir(out_dir)\\n    write_csv(out_dir / \\\"conversations_metrics.csv\\\", metrics)\\n    write_jsonl(out_dir / \\\"normalized_messages.jsonl\\\", messages)\\n    (out_dir / \\\"account_summary.json\\\").write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    # one-row csv summary, with complex lists serialized\\n    flat_summary = {k: json.dumps(v, ensure_ascii=False) if isinstance(v, (list, dict, tuple)) else v for k, v in summary.items()}\\n    with (out_dir / \\\"account_summary.csv\\\").open(\\\"w\\\", newline=\\\"\\\", encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\") as f:\\n        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=list(flat_summary.keys()))\\n        writer.writeheader()\\n        writer.writerow(flat_summary)\\n    write_master_index(out_dir, summary, metrics)\\n    if emit_sql:\\n        write_supabase_sql(out_dir, metrics, messages)\\n\\n# -----------------------------\\n# Compare mode\\n# -----------------------------\\n\\ndef compare_summaries(summary_paths: List[Path], out_dir: Path) -> None:\\n    safe_mkdir(out_dir)\\n    summaries = [json.loads(p.read_text(encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")) for p in summary_paths]\\n    keys = [\\n        \\\"conversation_count\\\", \\\"message_count\\\", \\\"text_coverage_pct\\\", \\\"named_conversation_pct\\\",\\n        \\\"document_heavy_conversation_pct\\\", \\\"deliverable_intent_pct\\\", \\\"avg_user_prompt_chars\\\",\\n        \\\"slash_commands_per_100_conversations\\\", \\\"unique_slash_commands\\\", \\\"conversations_per_active_day\\\",\\n        \\\"avg_delegation_score\\\", \\\"avg_description_score\\\", \\\"avg_discernment_score\\\", \\\"avg_diligence_score\\\",\\n        \\\"avg_four_d_score\\\", \\\"avg_productivity_score\\\", \\\"avg_context_waste_score\\\",\\n    ]\\n    rows = []\\n    for s in summaries:\\n        row = {\\\"account\\\": s.get(\\\"account\\\", \\\"unknown\\\")}\\n        for k in keys:\\n            row[k] = s.get(k, \\\"\\\")\\n        rows.append(row)\\n    with (out_dir / \\\"accounts_comparison.csv\\\").open(\\\"w\\\", newline=\\\"\\\", encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\") as f:\\n        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=[\\\"account\\\"] + keys)\\n        writer.writeheader()\\n        writer.writerows(rows)\\n\\n    md = [\\\"# Claude Accounts Comparison\\\\n\\\", \\\"| Metric | \\\" + \\\" | \\\".join(s.get(\\\"account\\\", \\\"unknown\\\") for s in summaries) + \\\" |\\\", \\\"|---\\\" + \\\"|---:\\\" * len(summaries) + \\\"|\\\"]\\n    for k in keys:\\n        md.append(\\\"| \\\" + k + \\\" | \\\" + \\\" | \\\".join(str(s.get(k, \\\"\\\")) for s in summaries) + \\\" |\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"\\\\n## Reading Rule\\\\n\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"- Higher productivity and 4D scores are better.\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"- Higher context waste is worse.\\\")\\n    md.append(\\\"- Very low text coverage means the export is incomplete or metadata-heavy; compare cautiously.\\\")\\n    (out_dir / \\\"accounts_comparison.md\\\").write_text(\\\"\\\\n\\\".join(md) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n\\n# -----------------------------\\n# CLI\\n# -----------------------------\\n\\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\\n    p = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\"Normalize Claude.ai exports and benchmark productivity using 4D-style metrics.\\\")\\n    p.add_argument(\\\"--input\\\", nargs=\\\"*\\\", help=\\\"Claude export .zip/.json/folder paths. Globs allowed.\\\")\\n    p.add_argument(\\\"--account\\\", default=\\\"claude_account\\\", help=\\\"Account label for this run.\\\")\\n    p.add_argument(\\\"--out\\\", default=\\\"out\\\", help=\\\"Output directory.\\\")\\n    p.add_argument(\\\"--emit-sql\\\", action=\\\"store_true\\\", help=\\\"Also emit Supabase schema and upsert SQL.\\\")\\n    p.add_argument(\\\"--compare\\\", nargs=\\\"*\\\", help=\\\"Compare two or more account_summary.json files instead of processing exports.\\\")\\n    return p\\n\\n\\ndef main() -> int:\\n    args = build_parser().parse_args()\\n    out_dir = Path(args.out)\\n\\n    if args.compare:\\n        compare_summaries([Path(p) for p in args.compare], out_dir)\\n        print(f\\\"OK: comparison written to {out_dir}\\\")\\n        return 0\\n\\n    if not args.input:\\n        raise SystemExit(\\\"ERROR: provide --input export.zip or use --compare summary.json summary2.json\\\")\\n\\n    inputs = expand_inputs(args.input)\\n    messages, conv_meta = normalize_exports(inputs, args.account)\\n    metrics = compute_metrics(messages, conv_meta, args.account)\\n    summary = account_summary(metrics, messages, args.account)\\n    write_run_outputs(out_dir, metrics, messages, summary, args.emit_sql)\\n\\n    print(\\\"OK: processed\\\", len(metrics), \\\"conversations /\\\", len(messages), \\\"messages\\\")\\n    print(\\\"Output:\\\", out_dir)\\n    print(\\\"Summary:\\\")\\n    for k in [\\\"conversation_count\\\", \\\"message_count\\\", \\\"text_coverage_pct\\\", \\\"named_conversation_pct\\\", \\\"document_heavy_conversation_pct\\\", \\\"avg_four_d_score\\\", \\\"avg_productivity_score\\\", \\\"avg_context_waste_score\\\"]:\\n        print(f\\\"  {k}: {summary.get(k)}\\\")\\n    return Aqui est\\u00e1 o diagn\\u00f3stico completo:\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Resultado \\u2014 Comparativo das 5 contas\\n\\n| M\\u00e9trica | **conta_365** | **lknhz** | **verinhaburgos** | directdiverg | lpab |\\n|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|\\n| Conversas | 13 | 61 | 13 | 147 | 236 |\\n| **Productivity Score** | **46.82** | **39.26** | **38.20** | 7.61 | 4.03 |\\n| **4D Score** | **41.48** | **34.10** | **38.79** | 20.52 | 18.09 |\\n| **Context Waste** | **3.61** | **14.25** | **16.50** | 73.04 | 78.15 |\\n| Named conversations % | 100% | 85% | 85% | 14% | 8% |\\n| Text coverage % | 94% | 80% | 65% | 11% | 11% |\\n| Doc-heavy % | 31% | 16% | 15% | 6% | 2% |\\n| Deliverable intent % | 62% | 61% | 46% | 9% | 6% |\\n| Avg prompt (chars) | 475 | 746 | 2034 | 692 | **30** |\\n| Slash cmds/100 convs | 254 | **298** | 231 | 135 | 64 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Leitura operacional\\n\\n**Tier A \\u2014 Uso estruturado**\\n- `conta_365`: menor volume, maior qualidade. 100% das conversas nomeadas, waste quase zero. Uso focado e orientado a entreg\\u00e1vel.\\n- `lknhz`: boa densidade de slash commands (298/100), deliverable intent alto (61%). Escala com governan\\u00e7a razo\\u00e1vel.\\n- `verinhaburgos`: prompts muito longos (2034 chars em m\\u00e9dia) \\u2014 sinal de contexto rico mas pode ser sobrecarga. Bom 4D.\\n\\n**Tier C \\u2014 Ru\\u00eddo alto**\\n- `directdiverg` e `lpab`: volume alto, governan\\u00e7a baixa. `lpab` tem 236 conversas com prompt m\\u00e9dio de **30 chars** \\u2014 uso fragmentado, provavelmente mobile/reflexivo, n\\u00e3o orientado a output. Context waste de 78% \\u00e9 o maior sinal de alerta.\\n\\n---\\n\\n**O que fazer agora com `directdiverg` e `lpab`:**\\nRodar mais batches vai confirmar o padr\\u00e3o \\u2014 mas o diagn\\u00f3stico j\\u00e1 \\u00e9 claro. O problema n\\u00e3o \\u00e9 quantidade de uso, \\u00e9 aus\\u00eancia de inten\\u00e7\\u00e3o estruturada. Naming + deliverable intent s\\u00e3o os dois alavancas mais f\\u00e1ceis de mover primeiro.\\n\\nO ZIP cont\\u00e9m todos os outputs por conta (`conversations_metrics.csv`, `productivity_master_index.md`, SQLs) + `accounts_comparison.csv/md`.\", \"citations\": []}], \"sender\": \"assistant\", \"created_at\": \"2026-05-16T16:07:54.429328Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2026-05-16T16:07:54.429328Z\", \"attachments\": [], \"files\": [], \"parent_message_uuid\": \"019e318a-4283-7836-9f5c-b1017a049bdc\"}, {\"uuid\": \"019e318d-eb62-7bee-ae34-38ec60500532\", \"text\": \"rode o py cintra all chats in this accont this is executar@gmail\", \"content\": [{\"start_timestamp\": \"2026-05-16T16:10:46.954896Z\", \"stop_timestamp\": \"2026-05-16T16:10:46.954896Z\", \"flags\": null, \"type\": \"text\", \"text\": \"rode o py cintra all chats in this accont this is executar@gmail\", \"citations\": []}], \"sender\": \"human\", \"created_at\": \"2026-05-16T16:10:46.955019Z\", \"updated_at\": \"2026-05-16T16:10:46.955019Z\", \"attachments\": [], \"files\": [], \"parent_message_uuid\": \"019e318a-4283-7854-acd9-f0be99889bba\"}, {\"uuid\": \"019e318d-eb62-7c86-bdb3-ddfb7dfbe326\", \"text\": \" The user wants to run the benchmark script on their current account (executar@gmail).
